title: Real Estate Virtual Operations & Marketing Partner
description:
Job Requisition: Real Estate Virtual Operations & Marketing Partner

Position: Real Estate Virtual Operations & Marketing Partner (US Market)

Location: Remote (Philippines)



Work Schedule: 40 hours per week, Monday – Friday. Must be available to work within 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM US Pacific Standard Time (PST), which is 12:00 AM (Midnight) – 10:00 AM Philippine Time (PHT).



Compensation: 40,000 – 55,000 PHP / month (Depending on experience)



We are a premier Virtual Assistant and AI agency dedicated to pairing world-class talent with top-performing businesses. We believe in empowering our tea
mbers, leveraging cutting-edge technology, and delivering unmatched operational excellence to our clients.



Role Overview

We are seeking an elite Virtual Operations Partner to own the operational movement of our clients' real estate businesses. Your core objective is to create predictable, scalable operations by managing transaction coordination, listing management, marketing execution, and CRM integrity. You will ensure that no contingency expires unnoticed, no deadline is missed, and the agent’s time is concentrated on revenue-generating activities.



Key Responsibilities:

Transaction & Listing Control

Contract-to-Close Management: Track timelines, monitor contingencies, coordinate inspections/appraisals, and communicate with escrow to ensure seamless closings.

Listing Management: Execute pre-listing checklists, schedule photographers, coordinate staging, ensure MLS data accuracy, and set up showing instructions. Listings must be launched organized and correctly positioned.

Buyer Workflow: Coordinate offer preparation, organize disclosure packets, set up timeline calendars, and track closing checklists.



Marketing & Database Management

Marketing Execution: Support digital presence via Canva graphic design, social media scheduling, SEO/SEM strategies,
 campaign deployment, and open house material preparation. Brand presentation must remain consistent and error-free.

CRM Integrity: Maintain contact entry accuracy, segment databases, log transactions, create follow-up tasks, and generate pipeline reports.



Communication: Ensure all written communication is clear, structured, and timely. Proactively update clients and vendors on current status, required actions, and timeline impacts.

Daily Operational Rhythm



Start of Day: Review all active transactions, confirm deadlines within 7 days, and identify risk points.

Midday: Follow up on inspections, escrow, and lenders; update the CRM; and confirm vendor timelines.

End of Day: Document transaction progress, prepare next-day priorities, and flag any compliance or risk items.



Qualifications & Requirements

Experience: Minimum of 3+ years experience as a Real Estate Virtual Assistant, Transaction Coordinator, or Operations Manager, with a mandatory focus on the US Real Estate industry.

Language: Exceptional, highly proficient English skills. Ability to write persuasive, error-free copy and professional transaction updates for an American audience.



Technical Skills: Proven expertise in real estate CRMs, MLS platforms, and transaction management software. Strong proficiency in Canva and foundational SEO/SEM.

Systemization: Ability to build and maintain listing checklist templates, buyer workflows, vendor contact lists, and compliance tracking forms.



Work-From-Home Infrastructure Requirements

Audio Equipment: A high-quality, professional-grade noise-canceling headset is mandatory.

Internet: Access to fast, reliable fiber-optic internet (minimum 50 Mbps) AND a reliable backup internet source.

Power: Uninterruptible Power Supply (UPS) or backup generator to ensure zero downtime.

Environment: A dedicated, quiet workspace free from household distractions.

title: Online Course Builder & Marketer — Remote, Full-Time ($7.50/hr, 40hrs/week)
description:
About Us

We’re ECS Agency, a UK-based done-for-you online course creation company. We build complete course businesses for coaches and consultants — from market research to curriculum design to platform builds to launch marketing. We currently have 20+ active clients and are growing fast. We need a second full-time course builder to work alongside our existing builder.



The Role

You’ll own the full build process for clients — taking them from onboarding through to a finished, launched course business. You won’t be doing video production or editing (we have a separate team for that). Your focus is everything else.



What you’ll be doing daily:

 ? Market research and competitor analysis for client niches

 ? Course curriculum design and content structuring (using our AI-assisted tools and frameworks)

 ? Writing and refining course scripts and lesson outlines

 ? Building websites, funnels, and landing pages in GoHighLevel and Framer

 ? Building course platforms and uploading content

 ? Creating 7-day challenge content (scripts,
s, social posts, registration pages)

 ? Building launch marketing assets (28-day launch sequences,
 campaigns, social content)

 ? Setting up automations and workflows in GoHighLevel

 ? Coordinating with our video editing team (sending briefs, receiving finished videos, uploading to platforms)

 ? Managing your own task list in ClickUp and hitting deadlines without being chased



Pay & Hours

 ? $7.50/hr, 40 hours/week ($1,300/month)

 ? Working hours: 8:00 AM — 4:00 PM UK time (GMT/BST)

 ? Paid weekly or biweekly

 ? Long-term, ongoing position — this is not freelance or project work



What We’re Looking For

Must-haves:

 ? GoHighLevel experience — funnels, websites, automations, workflows. This is non-negotiable. You need to know GHL inside out.

 ? A good eye for web design. The funnels, websites, and landing pages you build need to look professional and polished, not templated

 ? Strong written English — you’ll be writing course content,
s, and marketing copy

 ? Experience using project management tools (ClickUp preferred) — you’ll manage your own tasks, hit deadlines, and update statuses without being micromanaged

 ? Self-driven and proactive — we don’t want someone who waits to be told what to do. You see a problem, you flag it. You find a better way, you suggest it. You finish a task, you move to the next one

 ? Reliable and deadline-driven — when a task has a due date, you hit it. If something’s going to be late, you communicate early

 ? Comfortable working independently with minimal supervision

 ? Available to start within 1 week

Strong advantages:

 ? Framer experience (website and landing page builds)

 ? Experience building online courses on any platform

 ? Experience writing marketing copy or
 sequences

 ? Familiarity with AI tools (ChatGPT, HeyGen, or similar)

 ? Background in digital marketing or funnel building

 ? Experience working with coaches or consultants



How We Work

All tasks are SOPed with Loom recordings and templates — you won’t be guessing how to do anything. But we don’t want someone who just follows instructions robotically. We expect you to improve on the SOPs as you go. If you find a faster way, a better layout, a cleaner process — we want to hear it. Your job is to make the work better over time, not just maintain it.



What You’ll Get

 ? Stable, full-time work with a growing agency

 ? Clear SOPs and frameworks for every task — proper onboarding, not guesswork

 ? AI tools that handle the heavy lifting — you’re refining and building, not starting from scratch

 ? Direct support from our existing builder who knows every system inside out

 ? Room to grow — this role can evolve into a team lead position as we scale



How to Apply

Send a short message with:

 1. Your experience with GoHighLevel — what have you built? Be specific (screenshots welcome)

 2. A link to or screenshot of a website/funnel you’ve designed that you’re proud of

 3. Any experience with online course creation, Framer, or funnel building

 4. A brief example of marketing copy or an
 you’ve written (even a screenshot is fine)

 5. Your availability — when can you start?

 6. Confirm you can work 8:00 AM — 4:00 PM UK time



We’ll send a paid test task ($15) to shortlisted applicants — a GHL funnel build + a short piece of course content — so we can see your actual work before committing.

description:
DAP Brands is seeking a detail-oriented, technically savvy, and solution-driven Integrations Associate to support our mission of building seamless, scalable automations across the organization. This role goes beyond task execution. You’ll work closely with our Technology Integration Manager to design, maintain, and optimize workflows that improve efficiency across Sales, Marketing, and Operations.



If you enjoy connecting systems, solving process gaps, and leveraging automation tools to create reliable, intelligent workflows, this role is for you.



Key Responsibilities:

- Integration Setup & Maintenance: Assist in setting up, testing, launching, and maintaining integrations using platforms such as Zapier, Make, and GoHighLevel. Monitor automations for accuracy and performance, troubleshoot issues, and implement long-term fixes.

- Automation & Workflow Optimization: Identify inefficiencies in existing processes and propose smart automation solutions. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand needs and build tailored workflows.

- Technical Support: Work with APIs, webhooks, and basic scripting (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, SQL) to resolve data sync issues, system errors, and performance bottlenecks.

- Documentation & Training: Document workflows, integrations, and processes to ensure scalability. Assist in training internal users on newly built systems and automation tools.



Tools You’ll Work With:

- Automation & Integrations: Zapier, Make, Webhooks

- CRMs & Operations Tools: GoHighLevel, ClickFunnels, Stripe, ClickUp

- Collaboration Tools: Google Sheets, Zoom, Google Workspace

- Scripting & APIs: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, SQL



Application Instructions:

Please submit your application through the online form provided: 



- To be considered, you MUST type “MAVERICK” in front of your full name if you are applying via our website: 

- If you are an Integrations Associate who takes ownership, thinks in systems, and thrives in a fast-moving, automation-driven environment, we invite you to apply.

title: Administrative Virtual Assistant
description:
Job Opportunity: Administrative Virtual Assistant (Part-Time, Remote – Philippines)



Support a Nationwide Campaign and a Visionary Business Ecosystem



Position: Administrative Virtual Assistant



Location: Remote (Philippines)



Compensation: $5/hour (Paid Holidays & Annual Raises after Probation)



Schedule: 20 hours/week (Part-Time, with potential for Full-Time after 90 days)



About Us

You will be supporting the CEO of Innovative Global Entities (IGE) — a multifaceted enterprise managing 16 active brands including Get Biz Credit, Reimagine iT Inc., Excel Media Group, Affluential Magazine, Mind Your Business Podcast, and the upcoming 
 platform.



The flagship initiative you’ll primarily support is Fundable Futures — a 12-month program launching January 2026, designed to help 1,000 minority, women, and veteran-owned businesses in Atlanta qualify for $100K–$250K in business credit with no personal guarantee. You’ll help coordinate logistics, outreach, and reporting as we prepare for national scale.

Key Responsibilities



- Campaign Support & Task Coordination:

  • Assist in managing timelines and tasks across Fundable Futures campaign phases

  • Support communications with sponsors, cohorts, and partners

  • Track deliverables from internal tea
mbers and partners

  • Help document progress for reports and dashboards



- Administrative Management:

  • Organize and update files across Google Drive, SharePoint, and Dropbox

  • Maintain digital records and prepare reports or summaries fro
etings

  • Schedule Zoom calls, prepare agendas, and track meeting outcomes



- Communications Support:

  • Draft
 templates for outreach (Sendiio)

  • Coordinate follow-up messages, reminders, and cohort instructions

  • Monitor shared inboxes and support light customer service inquiries



- Systems & Brand Support:

  • Help QA and organize brand materials across our 16 IGE brands

  • Ensure SOPs and forms are updated in MS Teams, Google Sheets, or our CRM

  • Assist in maintaining project management boards for current initiatives



You Must Be:



- Detail-oriented and highly organized — can manage multiple priorities calmly

- A fast learner — you pick up tools like Zapier, Google Workspace quickly

- Excellent communicator — written English must be clear and professional

- Tech-savvy — comfortable navigating CRMs, cloud drives, and automation tools

- Self-motivated — you manage your time well and take ownership of tasks

- Team-player — you work well under a visionary CEO who moves fast



Requirements



- At least 2 years of experience as a VA or Admin Assistant

- Must have a reliable laptop/PC and fast internet

- Must be comfortable working between 9 AM – 2 PM EST (or overlapping hours)

- Proficient with Google Workspace, MS Teams, Photoshop, Google Sheets

- Familiarity with ChatGPT and/or AI agents is a must

- Familiarity with workflow automation using Zapier or Sendiio is a plus

- Must be comfortable using our proprietary CRM system



Compensation & Benefits



- $5/hour USD (paid bi-weekly via Payoneer or PayPal)

- Paid holidays after 90 days (for Full-Time)

- Performance-based full-time promotion

- Annual performance review and raise eligibility

- Training and mentorship from a high-performing executive team

- Work with purpose across 16 brands with global impact



Deadline to apply: October 31, 2025

Start date: November 3, 2025



How to Apply: FOLLOW ALL INSTRUCTIONS BELOW



Create a Google Drive folder titled

“VA Skills Test – [Your Full Name]”  

Inside that folder, complete and upload the following 4 required tasks (plus an optional bonus task).

 When finished, share the folder link with >> 

and make sure sharing is set to 

“Anyone with the link can view.”



  Task 1 – Organizational & Task Management (Google Sheets)

Create a simple project tracker for a campaign called Fundable Futures Sponsor Outreach .

Include columns for:

 

Task Name

Responsible Person

Due Date

Status

Notes



Add at least 5 sample tasks and apply basic formatting (bold headers, color-coded status).

    Upload: Google Sheet or exported PDF in your folder.



Task 2 – Communication & Writing Skills (Google Docs)

Write a short 120–150 word
 to a potential sponsor introducing the Fundable Futures program and requesting a short meeting.

Tone should be professional, clear, and persuasive.

    Upload: Your
 as a Google Doc or PDF.



Task 3 – Tech & Systems Familiarity (Screenshots)

Take screenshots showing you using Google Sheets, Google Drive, and (if applicable) any automation tools like Zapier, Make (Integromat), or Sendiio.

Place them in a subfolder titled “Screenshots.”

Bonus (Optional) – Initiative Check (1-Minute Video)

Record a 1-minute video introducing yourself and explaining how you stay organized when supporting multiple brands or projects.

    Upload: Unlisted YouTube or Loom link inside a text file titled “Video Link.txt.”



After You Finish

Share your main folder link with

title: High-Performance Executive Operator (Data & Operations)
description:
This is not a traditional Executive Assistant role.



We are looking for a high-performance operator who can combine data intelligence with operational execution and work directly alongside a fast-moving, visionary leader.



This role is for someone who can bring structure to data, clarity to decisions, and execution to leadership initiatives.



If you thrive in fast environments, think analytically, and operate with ownership, keep reading.



Who We Are:



DAP Brands is a community of high performers building businesses that create real impact.



Our leadership team moves quickly, thinks strategically, and expects people to take responsibility rather than wait for instructions.



We value:

• Speed

• Accountability

• Emotional maturity

• Precision

• Ownership

• Loyalty to the mission (not ego)



What This Role Really Is:



This role combines Data Analysis + Executive Operations.



Your first responsibility is to bring order to data across the organization: Cleaning, structuring, and translating it into clear insights.



Once the data foundation is organized, you will operate as a high-level executive, helping leadership execute faster and smarter.



You will help:



• Clean, organize, and analyze business data

• Turn raw data into meaningful reports and insights

• Support leadership with decision-ready information

• Protect your leader’s time and priorities

• Enforce accountability across leadership initiatives

• Translate strategy into structured execution

• Identify problems before they become fires

• Move initiatives forward without constant direction

• Bring clarity to complex situations



You will sit close to leadership.

You will see how decisions are made.

You must handle that with professionalism, discretion, and maturity.



What This Role Is NOT



This role is not for someone who:



• Needs constant praise or reassurance

• Struggles with direct feedback

• Prefers slow corporate environments

• Gets overwhelmed by changing priorities

• Waits for instructions instead of solving problems

• Is uncomfortable working with data and systems

• Frequently job hops every year



We operate in a high-accountability environment.



If you need tone cushioning or excessive structure, this will likely feel uncomfortable.



What Success Looks Like (First 90 Days):



Within your first 90 days, you:



• Organize and clean key business data sets

• Create structured reporting for leadership decisions

• Build dashboards or reports that bring visibility to operations

• Run leadership meetings with clear structure and follow-through

• Anticipate your leader’s needs before they are spoken

• Track priorities and ensure accountability across teams

• Bring solutions instead of just raising issues

• Operate calmly and clearly under pressure



The Profile That Thrives Here



You likely:



• Have experience in data analysis, reporting, or business analytics

• Are comfortable working with spreadsheets, dashboards, and structured data

• Have supported a founder or senior executive before

• Have stayed 3+ years in at least one meaningful role

• Enjoy solving complex operational problems

• Can build systems and workflows from scratch

• Communicate clearly and directly

• Are emotionally regulated and professional under pressure

• Think in outcomes and insights, not just tasks



You are someone who:



• Notices patterns others miss

• Brings clarity where others see chaos

• Moves things forward without being asked twice



Compensation & Growth:



This role offers:



• Competitive compensation aligned with performance

• Direct exposure to executive decision-making

• The opportunity to shape internal systems and operations

• Long-term growth as the company scales



At DAP Brands, we reward impact and ownership, not just tenure.



Final Note



This role is for someone who wants to build, solve, and operate at a high level.



If you enjoy working with data, solving operational problems, and supporting leadership execution, this could be an excellent fit.



If you're looking for a comfortable, slow-paced corporate role, this probably isn't it.



But if you want to operate at a high level and help build something meaningful, apply on our website 
/careers and write MAVERICK before your name.

title: Elite Level Media Buyer (NewsBreak)
description:
We are hiring a killer media buyer to help us scale on NewsBreak.



Direct NewsBreak experience is a plus, but it is not required. We understand that experienced NewsBreak buyers are rare. We are open to hiring someone with strong Meta or other paid traffic experience who can quickly learn a new platform and figure out what works.



We are looking for someone who already knows how to buy media at a high level and does not need constant direction.



What We’re Looking For:



The right person must have real media buying experience and be able to make decisions independently. This is not an entry-level role, and it is not a fit for someone who needs to be told exactly what to do every day.



You should know all the major metrics and you should know how to use those numbers to evaluate performance, spot problems, and make profitable decisions.



Requirements: 



- Strong media buying experience on Meta or another major paid traffic platform

- Experience managing thousands of dollars per day in ad spend

- Strong understanding of campaign metrics and how they impact profitability

- Ability to test efficiently and interpret results correctly

- Ability to know when to cut, when to hold, and when to scale

- Self-sufficient and confident in building strategy without being micromanaged

- Comfortable adapting to a new platform and learning quickly



Do Not Apply If:



- You need to be told exactly what to do every day

- You have very little media buying experience

- You have never managed meaningful daily spend

- You do not know how to read campaign data and make decisions from it

- You are a button-pusher instead of a real strategist

- You wait around for someone else to hand you the answer



Ideal Candidate:



The ideal candidate is someone who has already spent serious money on paid traffic, understands how to manage campaigns profitably, and can bring that same skill set to NewsBreak. We are looking for someone who can think independently, test intelligently, and find winning strategies on their own.



To apply, D
 the info below:



1. Platforms you’ve bought on

2. Highest daily spend managed

3. Verticals/offers you’ve run

4. One campaign you scaled successfully

5. What you look at first when performance drops

title: Operations & Dispatch Coordinator (Virtual Dispatcher – PH, Full Time, Work From Home)
description:
We’re Site Masters, a fast?growing junk removal and light demolition company serving Tampa Bay, Florida (US).



We’re hiring a full?time Operations & Dispatch Coordinator in the Philippines to manage phones, schedules, and routing for our crews. If you’re calm under pressure, great on the phone with Americans, and like keeping things organized, this role is for you.



What You’ll Do

Answer inbound calls from US customers (residential & commercial) with a friendly, confident tone

Make outbound calls for estimate follow ups, missed calls, and basic invoice reminders

Book and update jobs in our software (Jobber) and keep customers updated with ETAs

Build and adjust daily routes for 2–3 trucks so days are efficient

Track tech time (clock ins / clock outs / job durations) and close out jobs accurately

Maintain simple spreadsheets for leads, jobs, and basic COGS (disposal, hours, fuel)

Help with recurring admin tasks, organizing photos, Google Drive folders, and simple reports

You will work directly with the owner and an existing VA. This is a long?term role with room to grow into senior operations if you perform well.



Requirements

Location: Philippines (home?based, quiet workspace)

Experience:

2+ years as a VA, dispatcher, scheduler, or operations coordinator for a US?based service company (construction, cleaners, junk removal, home services, etc.)

Solid phone experience with US clients (inbound + outbound)

Skills:

Excellent spoken and written English

Confident on live calls; can handle upset customers calmly

Comfortable with CRMs / job management tools (Jobber a plus), Google Workspace, and spreadsheets

Good with numbers and details (time tracking, simple P&L, invoices)

Technical Setup:

Reliable computer (i5/Ryzen 5 or better, 8GB+ RAM)

Stable wired internet (at least 25 Mbps) + backup internet

Quality USB headset and quiet workspace

Willing to use Hubstaff for time tracking and screenshots

Schedule & Compensation

Hours: 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM EST, Monday–Friday (with 30–60 min lunch)

Sometimes: 1–2 Saturday half days per month during busy periods (extra pay)

Salary Range: $1,300 – $1,500 USD/month, depending on experience and performance

Extras:

1 paid day off per month after probation

Paid PH regular holidays after probation

Performance bonuses based on reliability, accuracy, and call handling

Stable, long?term role with growth potential

How To Apply (Follow Exactly)

When you apply through OnlineJobs.ph, include the following at the top of your message:



Your expected monthly salary in USD

A 2–4 sentence summary of your US phone experience (inbound & outbound)

Your internet speed (download/upload) and a short description of your computer setup

Shortlisted applicants will be invited to a second step with a short call scenario and tech check.

title: Full-Time Operations Coordinator (Remote | Long-Term | Growth Opportunity)
description:
Full-Time Operations Coordinator (Remote | Long-Term | Growth Opportunity)



At **Site Masters**, we don’t just hire for roles — we hire for **impact**.

We’re a Tampa Bay–based junk removal and property cleanup company scaling fast, and we’re looking for an **Operations Coordinator** who thrives in structure, solves problems fast, and leads with calm under pressure.



This role is the heartbeat of our business. You’ll coordinate people, trucks, schedules, and clients — turning chaos into clarity every day. If you’re resourceful, emotionally intelligent, and love creating order in a fast-moving environment, this is your opportunity to grow with a company that’s building something lasting.



*Role Overview**



As our Operations Coordinator, you’ll oversee daily field operations, logistics, and client coordination — ensuring every project runs on time, on budget, and up to our standards.

You’ll work directly with leadership to streamline systems, improve efficiency, and manage a growing remote and on-site team.



This is a long-term role with room for advancement. The right person will grow into a leadership position as the company expands regionally.



**Key Responsibilities**



**Project & Logistics Management (40%)**



* Assign and manage daily technician routes and ensure crews are prepared for each job.

* Oversee dispatch, equipment checklists, and field communications.

* Solve day-to-day issues fast — rerouting, rescheduling, and supporting the field team.

* Maintain Jobber CRM and Google Workspace records.



**Client & Financial Oversight (25%)**



* Create and send estimates and invoices.

* Follow up on open quotes (24-hr, 48-hr, 1-week intervals).

* Request deposits, track payments, and reconcile accounts.

* Coordinate material orders and deliveries.



**Admin, Marketing & Lead Support (25%)**



* Organize project photos, Google Drive folders, and reporting dashboards.

* Assist with light marketing/SEO tasks (GBP updates, online listings, citations).

* Research and document new leads weekly (mobile home parks, property managers).

* Support recurring reporting and internal communication.



**Growth & Process Development (10%)**



* Identify inefficiencies and propose new systems or tools.

* Maintain and update SOPs in Notion.

* Support hiring and training as the team grows.



---



**Requirements**



Onboarding & Training

We’re still building many of our systems — you’ll be learning by doing.

The first few weeks focus on shadowing calls, hopping in right away, understanding our client workflow, and getting comfortable in our online software and Jobber. Expect an active learning curve and close collaboration with our leadership team.

Comfortable using Hubstaff time tracking (with screenshots) — we use it for transparency and workflow review.



* **Education:** Bachelor’s degree (Business, Operations, or related field) *preferred*

* **Experience:** 3–5 years in operations, scheduling, client success, customer support or logistics (construction, junk removal, or service industry a plus).

*** Expert Level English

* **Skills:**



* Strong project management and process-building abilities.

* Proficient in CRMs, Google Workspace, and cloud systems (Jobber or similar).

* Excellent written and spoken English.

* High attention to detail, self-discipline, and proactive communication.

* Fast computer proficiency (55+ WPM typing, reliable setup).



**Our Core Values**



**1. Unshakable Integrity**



*Do what’s right — especially when no one’s watching.*

We tell the truth, follow through, and communicate with empathy. You own your mistakes, treat clients with respect, and protect the company’s reputation like it’s your own.



**3. Relentlessly Driven**



*Earn it every day.*

You push yourself to learn, improve, and perform at a high level — not because someone’s watching, but because it’s who you are.



These aren’t buzzwords. They’re how we hire, promote, and build trust.



---



### **Compensation & Benefits**



* **Salary:** $1,200 – $2,000 USD/month (based on experience and performance).

Compensation grows with mastery and ownership. Strong performers can advance quickly in both pay and responsibility.



**Schedule**: 8 AM – 6 PM EST, Monday–Saturday (~50 hrs/week).

This is a fast-moving environment — ideal for someone who thrives on structure, consistency, and responsibility.

* **Location:** Remote (Philippines-based preferred).

* **Start Date:** Immediate, with 1-month paid trial.

title: Inbound Appointment Setter & Admin for US Junk Removal Company (Near?Native English Only)
description:
About the Role

We run a growing junk removal & light demolition company in Florida (USA). Most of our leads are high intent inbound calls from Google. Your #1 job is to answer/return those calls fast, understand what the customer really needs, and book them into our schedule. When phones are quiet, you’ll handle light admin tasks.



Salary: 

$900–$1,300 per month (full time) + performance bonuses based on booked & completed jobs. 

Salary once fully ramped with incentives can reach $1,500.



Responsibilities



Answer inbound calls from US customers and call back missed calls quickly.

Understand what the caller actually wants (example: difference between “where can I drop my brush?” vs “can you haul this brush away for me?”) and respond appropriately.

Ask a few simple questions, collect photos when needed, and book jobs into our calendar in the correct time windows.

Run our 7?day follow-up playbook on unbooked leads: calls, texts, and confirmations using our CRM (GoHighLevel).

Confirm next day jobs, reschedule when needed, and keep the schedule tight for our crews.

Do light admin work between calls (updating notes, simple spreadsheets, basic
 tasks).

Requirements



Excellent spoken and written English with near native / neutral American accent.

Strong listening and comprehension skills. You must catch subtle differences in what people say and ask clarifying questions.

Prior experience on the phone with US/UK/AU customers (appointment setting, customer service, or call center). Ideally 3 years on the phone with us/uk/eu customers.

Comfortable working US hours (roughly 9am–5pm US Eastern,  Monday to Saturday).

Reliable internet, backup connection, and a quiet place to take calls.

Coachable, reliable, and willing to follow scripts AND use judgment when real life doesn’t match the script.

Nice to Have



Experience with home services (plumbing, HVAC, cleaning, junk removal, etc.).

Experience using CRMs like GoHighLevel, HubSpot, or similar.

Compensation



Full time, 50 hours/week.

Competitive salary based on experience, paid weekly (we will discuss your desired rate).

Long term role for the right person; we invest in training and want you with us for years, not months.

How to Apply (follow these steps exactly)



Subject line: Appointment Setter – [Your Name]

Include:

Your resume.

Your expected monthly salary in USD for full time work.

Voice sample (required):

Record 45–60 seconds (Vocaroo, Loom, etc.) introducing yourself and reading this scenario in your own words:

“A caller says: ‘Can I drop my brush off somewhere?’

Please respond as if you work for our junk removal company. Clarify what they mean and explain what we can or cannot do for them.”

Please include your current tech setup. Which laptop/desktop you are using, how many monitors, etc.

Please include an image of a typing test result on 
. Medium text - 1 minute in duration.

Send the link in your application.

Screenshot of your internet speed test.

Applications that do not follow all steps will not be considered.

title: VA Interior Design Assistant
description:
About Us

We are a dynamic and growing interior design firm looking for a highly organized and proactive Virtual Assistant (VA) to support our design team remotely. This role is perfect for someone with experience in interior design and a passion for supporting creative teams. You’ll work closely with designers to bring their vision to life through 3D modeling, project coordination, and procurement logistics. If you’re a detail-oriented professional who thrives in a fast-paced environment, we want to hear from you!



Key Responsibilities

- 3D Modeling & Rendering: Collaborate with designers to create high-quality 3D models and photorealistic renderings using design tools such as SketchUp, Revit, or similar software.

- Construction & Planning Documentation: Assist in preparing floor plans, elevations, sections, and other technical drawings for design development and construction.

- Materials & Product Research: Research materials, finishes, and furnishings that meet the project’s needs; compile detailed product specifications and comparisons.

- Vendor Communication & Procurement Support: Coordinate with vendors and suppliers to request samples, pricing, and lead times. Help prepare procurement schedules and manage order tracking.

- Project Coordination: Keep digital files organized, maintain project documentation, and ensure designers are updated on outstanding tasks and product delivery timelines.

- Administrative Support: Provide general administrative assistance, including scheduling meetings, updating client presentations, and entering data for project tracking.

Qualifications

- Proven experience in interior design support or a related Virtual Assistant role.

- Proficiency in design software: Revit (Priority), Enscape for SketchUp, Enscape for Rhino, or other rendering software. Familiarity with Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, InDesign) is a plus.

- Strong research, organizational, and multitasking skills.

- Excellent written and verbal communication abilities.

- Self-motivated, dependable, and able to manage tasks independently in a remote setting.

- Must be available to work during PST business hours.

Why Join Us?

- Work with a creative and collaborative design team that values innovation and attention to detail.

- Flexible, remote work environment that promotes work-life balance.

- Opportunity to grow and gain hands-on experience in a fast-paced interior design setting.

Ready to be part of an innovative design team?

If you’re passionate about interior design, tech-savvy, and thrive in a remote role, we’d love to have you onboard. Apply today!

title: Mortgage Loan Processor
description:
Job Title: Mortgage Loan Processor



Employment Type: Full-Time



Company: NEXA Mortgage, LLC



Position Overview

We are seeking a reliable and detail-oriented Mortgage Loan Processor to support our growing pipeline. This position will work directly with the Loan Originator to ensure files move smoothly from application to closing. The ideal candidate is organized, proactive, and comfortable communicating directly with borrowers to collect documentation and keep loans moving efficiently.



This role will primarily involve processing Conventional, FHA, and DSCR loans.



Key Responsibilities



Review new loan files for completeness and accuracy.



Submit files to underwriting and manage the loan through the underwriting process.



Review conditional approvals and prepare a clear list of required conditions.



Communicate directly with borrowers to request and collect required documentation.



Explain underwriting conditions to borrowers in a clear and professional manner.



Follow up with borrowers, third parties, and vendors to obtain outstanding items.



Upload and organize documents in the loan file and ensure compliance requirements are met.



Work with the Loan Originator to resolve underwriting conditions quickly.



Monitor loan progress and keep files moving toward clear to close.



Coordinate with title, appraisal, insurance, and other third-party providers as needed.



Loan Types Processed



Conventional Loans



FHA Loans



DSCR / Investor Loans



Qualifications



Prior experience as a Mortgage Loan Processor or Loan Coordinator preferred.



Familiarity with mortgage documentation and underwriting conditions.



Experience working with Conventional, FHA, and/or DSCR loans is a strong plus.



Strong communication skills and ability to work directly with borrowers.



Highly organized with strong attention to detail.



Ability to manage multiple loan files simultaneously.



Comfortable using mortgage software/LOS systems and document management platforms.



Key Traits for Success



Strong follow-up and file management skills



Clear communication with borrowers and third parties



Ability to keep loans moving efficiently through underwriting



Detail-oriented and deadline-driven



Compensation



Compensation will be based on experience and qualifications.



How to Apply



Please submit your resume and a brief summary of your mortgage processing experience.

Responsibilities

High-Volume Editing: Create 3-5 high-quality Reels per week (15s to 60s duration).

nts.

Salary & Benefits

/message with the subject line: "I Am Your Video Storyteller"

title: Full-Time Virtual Assistant — Blog Publishing, Social Media & Admin (AI-Assisted)
description:

We generate a high volume of AI-assisted content every week: blog posts, Google Business Profile updates, and social media posts across multiple brands simultaneously.



We use AI to create the content. We need someone reliable, organized, and consistent to execute the publishing and distribution side — every single day, without needing to be chased. This is a checklist-driven role. If you love SOPs, repeatable routines, and getting things done cleanly, this job is for you.



WHAT YOU'LL DO EVERY DAY:



Publish AI-generated blog posts across multiple WordPress websites (formatting, featured images, categories, meta descriptions)



Post weekly Google Business Profile (GMB) updates across multiple clinic and service brand locations



Schedule and publish social media content to
, Instagram, and Google using Nano Banana and similar scheduling tools



Maintain content calendars in Google Sheets and Airtable



Organize Google Drive folders and assets using our naming conventions



Enter tasks and update statuses in ClickUp



Pull basic weekly performance reports from social platforms into tracking spreadsheets



Light inbox flagging and research tasks as assigned



YOU'RE THE RIGHT PERSON IF YOU:



Love checklists and thrive on repeatable daily tasks — this is an execution role, not a creative one



Have real experience publishing WordPress blog posts across multiple websites



Are solid in Google Sheets — formatting, formulas, color-coding, tracking

title: Sales Development Representative (SDR) – Real Estate Team
description:
Location: Remote

Reports To: Sales Manager / Team Lead

Type: Full-Time

Compensation: Base + Bonus



Job Summary:

We are looking for a proactive and motivated Sales Development Representative (SDR) to join our growing real estate team. The SDR will play a key role in generating new business opportunities by engaging potential clients, nurturing leads, and setting qualified appointments for our agent team. This position is ideal for someone who is organized, persuasive, and thrives in a fast-paced, goal-driven environment.



Key Responsibilities:

-  Prospect and qualify leads through phone calls, text,
, and CRM outreach.

-  Respond promptly to inbound inquiries from online platforms, social media, or marketing campaigns.

-  Conduct initial needs assessments to understand buyers’ or sellers’ timelines, goals, and motivation.

-  Schedule listing or buyer consultation appointments for senior agents.

-  Maintain accurate records of leads and activity in the team CRM (e.g., Salesforce).

-  Collaborate closely with the marketing and operations teams to optimize lead conversion.

-  Track daily activity metrics — calls, texts,
s, appointments set, and conversion rates.

-  Follow up with past clients, warm leads, and sphere contacts to generate repeat and referral business.

-  Continuously learn about new construction communities, local market trends, and loan products to better engage prospects.



Qualifications:

-  Strong communication and interpersonal skills — comfortable engaging with potential clients over the phone and online.

-  Highly organized, self-motivated, and able to manage multiple lead sources simultaneously.

-  Prior experience in real estate sales, inside sales, customer service, or telemarketing preferred.

-  Familiarity with real estate CRM systems and marketing automation tools is a plus.

-  Goal-oriented with a strong sense of accountability and urgency.



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs):

-  Qualified appointments set per week/month.

-  Lead-to-appointment conversion rate.

-  Response time to inbound leads. 

-  Follow-up consistency and pipeline activity.

-  Contribution to overall team closings.

Join Us!

At Axis Homes Realty LLC, we value teamwork, growth, and a client-first mindset. Joining our tea
ans being part of a supportive and collaborative environment where your contributions make a real impact. If you’re passionate about real estate operations and ready to grow your career with a company that values excellence and integrity, we’d love to hear from you!

title: Video Creator Needed – Customer Testimonial Style Videos (Stanford Van Lines)
description:

The goal is to create natural, authentic-looking customer feedback videos as if real customers are sharing their experience after a move.

title: Email Graphic Designer (Remote, US or EU Time Zone Availability)
description:

title: Manager, Operations Analytics & Systems
description:
Manager, Operations Analytics & Systems





Role Overview

This role is responsible for overseeing the company’s analytics, systems, and workflow functions as a unified operational capability. The Manager ensures that data, tools, and processes are aligned, scalable, and designed to support efficient decision-making across the organization.



 



This position manages technical and analytical tea
mbers, sets standards, defines priorities, and acts as the connective layer between leadership, operations, and execution teams. As the organization grows, this role expands naturally to oversee additional analytics, systems, or process-oriented roles.



 



Core Responsibilities



Team Leadership and Direction

Manage and mentor analysts, engineers, and systems-focused tea
mbers

Set priorities, timelines, and deliverables across analytics and systems work

Ensure clear ownership, accountability, and quality across all outputs

Review work for accuracy, usability, and alignment with business objectives

Analytics and Reporting Oversight

Own the company’s operational and workforce reporting strategy

Define and maintain standard metrics, definitions, and source-of-truth logic

Ensure dashboards and reports are actionable, consistent, and trusted

Translate leadership questions into structured analytical workstreams

Validate assumptions, calculations, and interpretations before distribution

Systems and Workflow Governance

Oversee the design and evolution of internal systems and workflows

Ensure tools are configured intentionally and work well together

Approve major workflow changes, automations, and integrations

Maintain consistency in how data flows across platforms

Prevent tool sprawl and fragmented processes

Cross Functional Alignment

Serve as the bridge between leadership, operations, analytics, and technical teams

Gather requirements and convert them into clear execution plans

Ensure insights from analytics are reflected in system or workflow changes

Support stakeholders in understanding and using tools and reports effectively



Documentation and Standards



 



Ensure documentation exists for systems, workflows, and reporting assets



 



Establish standards for naming, access, permissions, and maintenance



 



Reduce reliance on institutional knowledge held by individuals



 



Continuous Improvement and Scale



 



Identify recurring inefficiencies across tools, data, and workflows



 



Drive ongoing improvements based on usage patterns and feedback



 



Prepare systems and analytics functions to scale as the organization grows



 



Support onboarding of future roles within analytics, systems, or operations



 



What Success Looks Like



 



Leadership consistently relies on reporting and systems for decisions



 



Metrics are clearly defined and universally understood



 



Tools and workflows reduce manual effort and operational friction



 



Analytics insights translate into concrete operational actions



 



The organization scales without breaking processes or visibility



 



Qualifications



 



Experience managing analytics, systems, or operations-focused teams



 



Strong understanding of operational data, reporting, and performance metrics



 



Strong systems thinking and workflow design capability



 



Ability to translate business needs into structured technical and analytical work



 



Excellent communication, prioritization, and organizational skills



 



Ideal Candidate Traits



 



Thinks holistically about how data, tools, and people interact



 



Comfortable balancing strategic oversight with practical execution



 



Values clarity, consistency, and scalability



 



Enjoys building durable systems rather than one-off solutions



 



Able to grow with the organization as scope and responsibility expand

title: Workflow Engineer
description:
Workflow Engineer





Overview

We are looking for a Workflow Engineer to design, implement, and maintain the software systems that support our operations. This role focuses on improving productivity through better tools, smarter configurations, and clear, well-functioning workflows. You will collaborate with leadership and tea
mbers to understand needs, eliminate inefficiencies, and create systems that scale as the company grows.



Key Responsibilities



Software and Systems Analysis



• Audit all current software platforms and identify gaps, redundancies, and inefficiencies

• Evaluate team workflows to determine where tools are underutilized or misaligned

• Create clear recommendations for improvement based on business needs



Tool Selection and Implementation



• Research and recommend new tools that increase operational productivity

• Lead the setup and configuration of new software

• Build integrations between platforms to reduce manual steps and prevent errors

• Configure automations, workflows, access controls, and permissions



Workflow Optimization



• Translate existing business processes into streamlined digital workflows

• Build systems that support repeatable, scalable operations

• Document configurations and workflow logic for ongoing reference



Team Training and Adoption



• Train tea
mbers on new tools, workflows, and best practices

• Provide clear guidance to ensure proper usage of software across roles

• Create reference materials that support strong adoption and reduce knowledge gaps



Continuous Improvement



• Monitor system performance and user behavior to identify improvement opportunities

• Adjust workflows as business needs evolve

• Stay current on new features, emerging tools, and best practices in workflow automation



What Success Looks Like



• Teams use software consistently and correctly

• Manual tasks are reduced through well-designed automations

• Workflows run smoothly with fewer errors, delays, or handoff issues

• The company operates with clear, documented systems that scale cleanly

• Tools support growth rather than slow it down



Qualifications



• Experience configuring or administering business software systems

• Strong understanding of workflow design, automation, and integration concepts

• Ability to evaluate tools and match them to operational needs

• Comfortable learning new platforms quickly

• Strong communication skills and the ability to explain technical concepts clearly

• Proven ability to collaborate across departments



Preferred Skills



• Experience with workflow or automation tools such as Zapier, Make, Power Automate, or similar

• Familiarity with project management or operations platforms such as ClickUp, Monday, or Asana

• Ability to map processes visually using flowchart tools

• Strong problem solving and systems thinking ability



Ideal Candidate Traits



• Enjoys building order from complexity

• Curious and resourceful in finding the best tools for the job

• Strong attention to detail and quality

• Comfortable running training sessions and supporting user adoption

• Thinks in systems and understands how tools and people interact

title: Workforce Analyst (Remote)
description:
Workforce Analyst (Remote)



About the Role

We’re looking for a Workforce Analyst to help turn large volumes of workforce, scheduling, and operations data into clear, actionable insights. This role will own the process of gathering data from multiple systems, cleaning and combining it, and building automated dashboards and reports in Power BI and Excel to support decision-making across the organization.



You’ll work closely with leadership, central scheduling, and operations teams to identify trends, improve labor efficiency, and support data-driven management of staffing operations.



?



Key Responsibilities

 • Collect, clean, and consolidate data from multiple systems (HRIS, timekeeping, scheduling, agency, and productivity tools).

 • Build, maintain, and automate Power BI dashboards and Excel reports for workforce metrics (e.g., HPPD, utilization, coverage, call-outs, agency usage, etc.).

 • Create and maintain data models, charts, and visualizations that clearly tell a story.

 • Develop and document standard reporting templates and refresh processes.

 • Identify and correct inconsistencies between data sources.

 • Support ad-hoc data analysis requests from leadership.

 • (Preferred) Work with APIs, data connectors, and Power Automate/Power Query to automate data pulls directly from systems.



?



Qualifications

 • 2+ years of experience as a Workforce Analyst, Data Analyst, or similar role.

 • Advanced Excel skills (formulas, pivot tables, Power Query, macros preferred).

 • Strong Power BI experience (DAX, data modeling, interactive dashboards).

 • Solid understanding of data integrity, cleaning, and normalization.

 • Experience combining data from multiple systems/sources.

 • Excellent attention to detail and analytical thinking.

 • (Preferred) Experience with APIs, Power Automate, Google Sheets, or other data connectors.

 • (Preferred) Experience with workforce management, scheduling, or HR data.

 • Strong communication skills in English.



?



What We Offer

 • Full-time remote position based in the Philippines.

 • Competitive compensation based on experience.

 • Work with an international operations and analytics team.

 • Growth opportunities into data engineering, automation, or operations leadership roles.

title: Accounts Receivable VA
description:

Supportive and collaborative environment

What You’ll Be Doing

s to clients

Who This Role Is Not For

s or reminders

Role Details

Independent contractor position with competitive pay



Apply Here -

title: Short Form Video Editor - Games!
description:
I am looking to hire a short form video editor to handle a high volume of simple game content, starting with a test run. I have hundreds of videos currently needing edits, with more being produced regularly. We play games such as Tapple, Spindoodle, Timer Games, and games we make up. 



Our goal is to grow our entertainment & gaming channels from scratch so an ideal candidate would have a viral eye, good ideas for pacing and previous experience editing short form content. We would like our short form videos to garner significant amounts of views so its important the editing helps reinforce that. 



For this test, I want to see several different reels of the same footage that can be posted to Instagram, TikTok, and Youtube Shorts. I will provide 2-10 minutes of raw footage per game and want a final video that's up to ~120 seconds. Your goal is to create engaging content that will help grow our social media channels. Great videos will have superior retention rates and prolonged watch time. 



Goals:

- Hook the viewer within the first 2 seconds

- Maximize retention to keep viewers watching until the end

- Emphasize emotion and reactions

- Make the video understandable without sound

- No empty space

- Create loopable endings if possible



Please let me know if you are interested, and I can send over the footage.



Suggested Requirements:

• Proficient in CapCut and or other softwares to deliver short form content

• Strong understanding of short-form content - hooks, pacing, captions, transitions

• Reliable internet connection and ability to meet deadlines consistently

• Good communication in English (written)

title: Content Strategist & Short?Form Video Producer (Full?Time, Remote – Philippines)

You will help turn founder ideas into consistent weekly content across LinkedIn, X 
), and short?form video (TikTok, Reels, Shorts). Content will focus on:

AI tools and workflows



Lessons for builders, founders, and operators



Community and product building

Strategy & Research

Draft newsletter or
 content summarizing key lessons, experiments, or ideas

A short Loom video (max 3 minutes) walking through one of your videos and explaining how you approached the hook, pacing, and captions.

title: Virtual Assistant – Finance & CRM Support (Debt Advisory)
description:
We’re looking for a proactive, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to join our growing debt advisory and capital markets team. In this role, you’ll play a key part in keeping our clients’ information organized, supporting smooth workflows, managing our CRM (HubSpot), and helping create polished, lender-ready presentations. 



This isn’t a typical admin job—you’ll be working closely with financial documents, spreadsheets, and structured processes, helping us keep everything running efficiently while making a real impact on our clients’ experience. If you enjoy staying organized, taking initiative, and contributing to a fast-paced professional environment, this role is a perfect fit. 



Key Responsibilities

Client Onboarding & Document Management 

• Set up and manage secure client data rooms (Google Drive, Dropbox, SharePoint) 

• Create and maintain standardized folder structures 

• Distribute document request lists and track received vs. missing items 

• Follow up with clients on outstanding documents 

• Maintain version control and confidentiality



Financial Document Organization 

• Collect and organize: financial statements (P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow), bank statements, tax returns, AR/AP aging, and debt schedules 

• Ensure consistent file naming and date formats 

• Flag missing documents or periods (minimal interpretation required)



CRM Administration (HubSpot) 

• Create and update contacts, companies, and deals 

• Maintain clean and consistent CRM records 

• Update deal stages, notes, and activity logs 

• Generate basic pipeline reports



PowerPoint & Presentation Support 

• Prepare draft pitch decks using provided templates 

• Populate slides with provided financial and company data 

• Proofread and format lender-ready materials 

• Create lender-specific versions when needed



Scheduling & Admin Support 

• Coordinate meetings and manage calendars 

• Send invites, agendas, and follow-ups 

• Maintain internal trackers and process checklists 

• Assist with document editing and light research



Qualifications 

• At least 2 years of experience as a Virtual Assistant supporting finance, advisory, lending, real estate, or other professional services businesses preferably with a finance or accounting focus 

• Experience working with CRM systems, preferably HubSpot, or similar platforms 

• Strong professional customer service and written communication skills 

• Highly organized and detail-oriented, with the ability to manage multiple tasks and deadlines 

• Proficient in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint) and Google Workspace (Sheets, Docs, Drive) 

• Comfortable working with spreadsheets, structured data, and financial documents 

• Strong time management skills with a high level of discretion and confidentiality 

• Self-motivated and able to work independently while following established SOPs 

• Reliable internet connection and a professional home office setup 

• Availability during Mountain Standard Time (MST) business hours 

• Comfortable using a time-tracking system 

• Must have a valid NBI Clearance



How to Apply:

Please send a link to your resume along with a cover letter highlighting your experience with CRM systems (preferably HubSpot) and organizing financial or client information.



We’re excited to find the right fit for our team!

title: VA needed -Marketing Strategist- Full Time, WFH, US Hours
description:
Hello there, awesome VA!



I'm the owner of a small IT company (9 employees- 3 in the Philippines and 6 in the US/ Costa Rica). We're based in Arizona, USA. We provide IT services to small businesses, cybersecurity, and cloud services as well.



We have 3 amazing VAs already, but we're getting busier, and we can use your help...



SOME OF THE EXPECTATIONS YOU SHOULD HAVE WHEN WORKING WITH US:



• Ongoing (monthly) manager review and feedback- you should never guess where you are "standing" and what you, AND THE COMPANY, can do better!

• Paid certifications- we will pay for your courses, tests, and allocate time during business hours to help you achieve your desired goals

• Paid vacations- it's important to us that you are happy, healthy, and have a work-life balance!

• Bonuses- when we win, you win!

• Raises- As we grow, we believe you should as well. We have to stay competitive as an employer to retain our awesome employees!

• Opportunities to grow- In our industry, we can't be on "cruise control"... We need to push our tea
mbers to stay ahead of the technology curve. Help you continually sharpen your skills with a focus on your career aspirations.

• Paid sick days- We understand life happens. We don't want you to feel that you have to drag yourself to work sick, if your body tells you to relax...



JOB RESPONSIBILITIES:



Note: While it seems like a LOT is included here, I prefer to list everything I can think of now to avoid major surprises. These tasks are currently handled by our virtual assistants. You will receive training and support to ensure you are comfortable with each responsibility.



Your MAIN responsibilities:



• As a Marketing Strategist, you’ll use AI tools, especially GPT, to write clear, persuasive marketing content and engaging B2B stories. You’ll work closely with the CEO to build marketing systems that help attract leads, increase engagement, and support growth. You’ll need to follow the brand’s voice, work quickly, and focus on the results that matter.

• Responsible for Marketing Analytics

-Analyze marketing campaign performance across digital and traditional channels to identify trends and opportunities.

-Develop and maintain dashboards and reports to monitor key marketing metrics such as ROI, conversion rates, and customer acquisition cost.

-Conduct customer segmentation and targeting analysis to enhance personalization and engagement.

-Perform A/B testing and interpret results to guide campaign optimization.

-Collaborate with cross-functional teams to translate data insights into actionable marketing strategies.

-Present findings and recommendations to stakeholders to support data-driven decision-making.

• Social media management (LinkedIn,
, X.com, and Instagram)

• Work alongside our Marketing Consultant and Full Stack Developers on the business development/marketing side of the business.

• Present strategy proposals and performance reports to stakeholders

• Using
 marketing tools like Glasshive, Eventbrite, and other tools for marketing campaigns and assisting with event coordination, venues, guest speakers, and attendees.

• Basic lead generation using Apollo & LinkedIn



OTHER tasks that you can assist with:



• Provide
/call/chat support for inquiries, coordinate information with both clients and company employees (This is NOT a tech support job, but you will assist with coordinating service calls and meetings with clients and vendors)

• Calendar management

• Coordinate courier pickups and deliveries.

• Assist with basic internal audits, documentation, and file management

• Website (WordPress) basic content changes

• Create website and marketing content (Technology-related blog posts from vendor-provided materials, our engineers, and social media.

• Post jobs, candidate screening, review and respond to applications, scheduling interviews, and interview with applicants when needed.

• Assist with projects as needed



WORK HOURS:

• Mon-Fri at 8am-5:30pm (Arizona time zone- MST -7)

• Paid (US) holidays, time-off



REQUIRED:

• AMAZING personality and work ethic

• Excellent written and verbal English with minimal accent

• At least 3-5 years of experience as a Marketing Strategist or similar roles like Digital Marketing Manager, Marketing Analyst, Marketing Manager, Performance Marketing Manager, Growth Marketing Manager, Integrated Marketing Manager, or Digital Marketing Specialist.

• Experience in office applications such as Word, Excel, Outlook, and Teams

• Experience with GPT-4, Claude, or similar AI tools

• Experience in Social Media Marketing, LinkedIn,
, YouTube Shorts

and
 marketing.

• Knowledgeable in Marketing Analytics

• Copywriting frameworks (PAS, AIDA, etc.)

• Experience in Canva, Notion, Cap Cut, Descript, social media management tools, and simple video editing

• Experience in Digital Marketing

• Metrics-driven content strategy and growth loops

• Experience with, and understanding of SEO

• Content Writing

• Technologically savvy

• Knowledge of ticketing systems is a bonus, but not required.

• Knowledgeable with basic data entry



MORE DETAILS:

• A PRE-EMPLOYMENT BACKGROUND CHECK is performed (on our expense). You must have a 100% clean background check. Please do not apply if you don't have a 100% clean background check.

• As part of this position requirement, you must have a computer that will be used exclusively for your work with us. This means we will be installing our security software on that computer, will remove admin rights from you, and monitor/ control it for security and compliance reasons. In return, we will pay you additional “rent” fees, on top of your salary, in the amount of several hundred dollars. Details about this “rental” will be discussed during your second interview. There are minimum requirements that your computer must have in order to be employed with us. You must have a Computer/Laptop with at least i5 minimum 9th gen processor (preferably a newer one) with 16 GB RAM or more, or Ryzen 5/7 (MUST include TPM support) as well as Windows 11 OS.

• You must have a fast and reliable internet connection, minimum 30mbps.

• Noise-cancelling headphones

• At least 1 year of experience working night shift

• Further details and information will be discussed with qualified candidates.



HOW TO APPLY?



Answer the questions below, or you may also send an
 to 
 with the subject line “MS-Feb2026” with your answers:



- An attachment of your resume in PDF format/ link of you resume if you will send us a message.

- A confirmation (simple written statement) that you have a 100% clean background with no criminal history.

- A confirmation (simple written statement) that you understand the business hours (MST\ Arizona time zone.

- A confirmation that you have experience with night shift/ working at night.



Answer the following questions: (We have ways to check if your answer is AI-generated. Be as organic and honest in answering the questions. You will be asked to do a quiz/short tasks to gauge your knowledge during the hiring process.)

1. Can you describe your experience managing social media platforms, including the types of content you've created and the tools you've used?

-What social media platforms have you worked with, and what strategies have you implemented to grow engagement or reach?

2. Can you share your experience with SEO, including any tools you've used and strategies you've applied to improve search rankings?

-What specific SEO techniques have you implemented, and what results did you achieve?

3. Can you describe your experience with marketing analytics, including the tools you've used and how you've applied data to improve campaign performance?

-What key metrics do you typically track, and how do you use them to guide marketing decisions?

-Have you worked with platforms like Google Analytics(GA4), Google Tag Manager,
, LinkedIn & Youtube Analytics? If so, how have you used them?



- NO other information/cover letter or attachments should be included, besides a simple salutation and signature if so desired.



Only those who have followed the above instructions will be contacted within up to 2 business days with further instructions.



HIRING PROCESS:

- Resume submission

- Applicant questionnaire form

- Short tasks

-Initial Interview

- Final Interview



We're looking forward to having you join our family!



Beits Livneh, Owner

Gallop Technology Group

Some of the responsibilities that your position will include are:

Helpdesk (mostly escalations, but some basic if needed), cyber security related tasks/ audits, cloud hosting and virtualization (HyperV, SonicWall, VPN), MS365 management and automation, BCDR (Axcient), networking (Unifi, Sonicwall), IT projects, Servers maintenance (Windows only), scripts creation, testing new technology and other tasks related to IT.



IMPORTANT:

This position requires AT LEAST 2 years of MSP experience and at least 2 years experience in an L2 position, supervisory, or lead role. 100% clean background check, highly organized, technologically savvy, and can work diligently with little 
veral hiring steps will take place to verify the above requirements, including reference checking, employment verification, technical testing, and more.



Minimum technical level that you will need to be able to pass a test on:

• Several other situational and technical questions.

• CCNA certificate candidates preferred but not required.



MORE DETAILS:

• A PRE-EMPLOYMENT BACKGROUND CHECK is performed (at our expense). You must have 100% clean background check. Please do not apply if you don't have 100% clean background check.

• Personality is KEY for us. We are looking for an easy-going, yet professional, friendly and HONEST person.

• You will be working from home. This means you must have a quiet work environment and no excessive background noise.

• FAST AND RELIABLE INTERNET SERVICE IS REQUIRED With at least 100Mbps download speed  20+Mbps upload speed.

• As part of this position requirement, you must have a computer that will be used exclusively for your work with us. This means we will be installing our security software on that computer, will remove admin rights from you, and monitor/ control it for security and compliance reasons. In return, we will pay you additional “rent” fees, on top of your salary, in the amount of several hundred dollars. Details about this “rental” will be discussed during your second interview. There are minimum requirements that your computer must have, in order to be employed with us. You must have a Computer/Laptop with at least i5 minimum 9th gen processor (preferably a newer one) with 16 GB RAM or more or Ryzen 5/7 (MUST include TPM support) as well as Windows 11 OS.

• You must have recently worked on a night shift for 2 consecutive years or more.

• We evaluate/ review employees monthly and provide consistent feedback.

• We offer raises and bonuses according to performance, certifications, attitude, and customer reviews twice/ year.

• Your manager (our IT director) will create a roadmap for your "KPIs" and certifications track. We always push our team to earn certifications and additional knowledge – even allowing “disconnect study time” during business hours!

• On-call rotation (after-hours) for a week at a time, once every 4-5 weeks. It's VERY rare that we get calls after-hours (the average is only twice/ year!).

• We're closed on major US holidays, and at the completion of the first 3 months of employment, you'll qualify for paid holidays.

• Work hours are Mon-Fri at 8 am till 5:30 pm (UTC-07:00 , MST, Arizona time zone)

• Every 4 to 5 weeks, you'll be working 1/2 day on a Saturday (project work/catch-up work) and get 1/2 day off the week after

• Mandatory 1-hour lunch and additional breaks (as you need those) throughout the day.

• Further details and information will be discussed with qualified candidates.



EXPERIENCE REQUIRED:

• REQUIRED: Relevant minimum 2 YEARS experience working for an MSP

• REQUIRED: With AT LEAST 2 years experience in an L2 position, supervisory or lead role.

• REQUIRED: Microsoft Azure AD/ M365 experience

• REQUIRED: Experience working with an RMM and PSA software (DATTO preferred)

Other tools we use:

Barracuda DNS filter, AutoElevate, Cylance, Infocyte, Syxsense, IT Glue, SonicWall, Unifi, and more



HOW TO APPLY?



Answer the questions below, or you may also send an
 to 
 with the subject line "L2 Tech Support - Feb2026" with your answers:



- An attachment of your resume in PDF format/ link of you resume if you will send us a message.

Answer the following questions:

title: Funnel Builder
description:
Are you a wizard at turning concept products into high-converting funnels? We are looking for a creative Funnel Builder to join our team. In this role, you won’t just be "stacking blocks" - you’ll be leveraging the power of training and AI tools to build seamless, high-performance sales pages.



The Role

Your primary playground will be Funnelish. You will take competitor funnels as input and context, and transform them into full-blown funnels. This isn't just about copy and pasting; it’s about accurate copy, aesthetics (images, GIFS,...), and conversion logic.



Key Responsibilities:

1. Funnel Construction: Build and test multi-step funnels in Funnelish from scratch, based on instructions and prompts. This includes building advertorials, sales pages, checkout pages and upsell pages.

2. Technical Integration: Ensure tracking pixels, automations, and shopify integrations are firing correctly.

3. Collaborative Execution: Work closely in team to iterate on designs based on real-time data.



Skills needed:

1. B1/2 Level of English

2. Canva editing

3. ChatGPT usage



This is not:

- copy-and-pasting

- media buying

- store management

- supply chain management

- customer service



If you are interested for this job and if you have read the full job description. Start your application with 'I LIKE FUNNELS' and we will reach out to you.

title: Experienced Virtual Scheduler for U.S. Dental Office
description:
Full-Time | Remote | Philippines-Based

First Choice Dental Center | Louisville, Kentucky, USA



About Us



First Choice Dental Center is a modern dental practice in Louisville, Kentucky. We help patients feel comfortable, cared for, and informed from the first phone call to the final visit.



We are looking for a full-time Virtual Front Desk Coordinator based in the Philippines to support our front office remotely. This role is ideal for someone who is warm, organized, professional on the phone, and great at keeping things on track.



What You’ll Do



You will help manage communication and scheduling for our dental office by handling tasks such as:

 • Answering inbound phone calls

 • Making outbound calls to confirm appointments

 • Following up with patients who need to schedule treatment

 • Helping fill gaps in the schedule

 • Handling reschedules and cancellations

 • Sending reminders and assisting with next steps

 • Documenting patient notes accurately

 • Routing messages to the in-office team

 • Supporting same-day and emergency appointment requests



What We’re Looking For



We want someone who is:

 • Fluent in spoken and written English

 • Friendly, professional, and confident on the phone

 • Highly organized and detail-oriented

 • Reliable and consistent

 • Comfortable working during U.S. business hours

 • Able to multitask and stay calm under pressure

 • Coachable and open to feedback

 • Experienced in customer service, virtual assistant work, call handling, or scheduling



Preferred Experience



These are a plus, but not required:

 • Experience working for a U.S.-based company

 • Experience in dental or medical scheduling

 • Experience with Dentrix Ascend or similar scheduling software

 • Experience with phone systems like Mango Voice, RingCentral, or similar

 • Experience with patient follow-up, recall, or reactivation calls



Work Schedule

 • Full-time

 • Remote

 • Must be available during U.S. Eastern Time business hours

 • Consistent attendance is very important



Work-From-Home Requirements

 • Reliable computer

 • Strong internet connection

 • Quiet work environment

 • Headset with clear audio

 • Backup internet or power is a strong plus



Pay



$400 USD + Bonus



How to Apply



To apply, please send the following:

 1. Your resume

 2. A short voice recording introducing yourself

 3. A brief summary of your experience with phone support, scheduling, or front desk work

 4. Your internet speed and equipment setup



Important



To help us identify candidates who pay attention to detail, please include the phrase:



“Patient experience matters”



in the first line of your application.

- Creating and improving company operations manuals and SOPs

- Tracking tasks and ensuring deadlines are met

- Identifying operational issues and helping implement solutions

- Supporting leadership with day-to-day operational management



We are looking for someone who can take ownership, think ahead, and help manage processes not just follow instructions.



THE IMPORTANCE OF THIS ROLE



- This role is a key operational position within our company.

- You will directly impact:

- Guest satisfaction

- Team coordination and efficiency

- Operational consistency

- Overall business growth

- The right candidate will help us maintain high standards while also strengthening and improving our systems as we grow.



WHY WE’RE A GREAT PLACE TO WORK



We offer high-end vacation rentals with a strong focus on customer experience.



We have a strong work ethic and value each of our tea
mbers and the skills they bring. We provide detailed training, clear systems, and structured onboarding to help you succeed.



We encourage growth, accountability, and teamwork. We lead by example and support our team where they need it.



THE VALUES WE STAND BY



Customer experience is at the heart of our business.



We believe delivering an exceptional product for our guests creates memorable experiences they will cherish with friends and family.



- We stand behind our team

- We encourage training

- We support success

- We lead by example

- We work together



PAY AND HOURS

(These are negotiable)



The starting rate for this role will be between: $700–$800 USD per month

This position is available from: As soon as possible

This is a long-term position



Provisional Schedule (negotiable):



Monday – Friday

09:00 to 17:00 PST (Vancouver, Canada)



You will be available for at least: 30 hours per week



We will pay you weekly



You will receive time off for vacations (TBD)



We offer end-of-year bonuses based on performance



There is opportunity for increased responsibility and compensation over time.



NOW THE IMPORTANT PART – HOW YOU CAN APPLY:

If this role sounds perfect for you, we’d love to hear from you!



Please click this link to complete a short application form to get started:





We’ll get back to you within 2 working days of us closing the job applications. You don’t need to send your CV/Resume or cover letter at this time. We’ll request this from you if required.



Orion Rodgers

Coast & Host Vacation Rentals

title: Video Editor and VA

We're Vantage Agency a performance-driven marketing agency that works exclusively with real estate agents and brokerages in the US. We run full client acquisition systems for our clients (Meta & Google ads, CRM automation, AI follow-up, and more) and we're growing fast. We're looking for a sharp, self-motivated appointment setter who knows how to find the right people, start real conversations, and get qualified calls booked without needing to be micromanaged.

, or social platforms to introduce our offer and start conversations
