Large Commission bonus paid per closed client from appointments set.

title: Executive Office Operations Manager (USA , Pacific time zone)
description:
Executive Office Operations Manager



Remote | U.S. Construction & Design Company | Long-Term Leadership Opportunity



We are hiring a highly capable, organized, proactive, and dependable Executive Office Operations Manager to help run and grow the office side of our construction and design company in the United States.



This is not a basic assistant role.

This is a high-responsibility leadership position for someone who can help manage operations, support clients, coordinate schedules, organize systems, assist with design and project preparation, and help build a strong office team under the owner’s direction.



The right candidate will work directly with the owner and help create a professional, organized, high-end client experience from the first conversation through project planning, presentations, materials selection, scheduling, and ongoing office support.



Compensation Structure



Month 1: $1,000/month salary + $300 team support budget



Month 2: $1,250/month salary + $500 team support budget



Month 3 and onward: $1,500/month salary + $700 team support budget



Compensation growth is based on strong performance, successful organization of office operations, and the ability to help build, train, and manage support staff while maintaining smooth, professional, and reliable office performance.



Office Coverage Goal



Our goal is to operate the office 7 days per week with organized team coverage and strong client communication throughout business hours.



Office Hours



Monday to Thursday: 7:00 AM – 8:00 PM



Friday to Sunday: 7:00 AM – 3:00 PM



The manager is not expected to personally work all office hours alone.



The manager’s main schedule will be approximately 45 hours per week. Additional office coverage will be handled by support staff. The manager will help organize, train, supervise, and support the team so the office can operate at expanded hours while maintaining professionalism, consistency, and strong service quality.



As the support team becomes properly trained and trusted, they will help cover the remaining office hours under the manager’s supervision.



Hiring and Team Structure



The manager may assist in identifying, screening, onboarding, training, and supervising support staff, but all hiring decisions, approvals, schedules, role assignments, final acceptance, and employment terms will remain fully subject to the owner’s review and final approval.



There is no unofficial hiring process and no friend-referral hiring preference. All hiring will be handled through a transparent process that includes interviews, evaluation, work expectations, conditions of acceptance, and company approval. Final decisions regarding whether any candidate is hired, assigned, approved, scheduled, or retained will be made by the company.



Main Responsibilities



Manage day-to-day office operations



Oversee client communication by phone,
, messaging apps, and social platforms



Schedule, confirm, and follow up on client appointments



Support lead follow-up and appointment coordination



Manage calendars, reminders, schedules, and business logistics



Improve office systems, structure, accountability, and follow-through



Support invoicing, bookkeeping coordination, payment tracking, and administrative follow-up



Help organize Instagram activity and content posting



Help organize, train, and supervise support staff



Maintain office performance, structure, and professionalism



Make sure tasks are completed properly and nothing falls through the cracks



Client, Design, and Project Support Responsibilities



Work directly with the owner and with clients during the early stages of each project



Join Zoo
etings with clients to help present services and guide the conversation professionally



Help clients understand options for kitchens, bathrooms, homes, remodels, and renovations



Help clients find inspiration, products, finishes, materials, and project direction



Assist with 2D drafting, measurements, layout support, and basic architectural/interior planning



Help prepare presentations, concept materials, and service overviews for clients



Support a more personal, professional, and organized client experience from the first interaction



Help present the company’s services in a high-end, clear, and client-friendly way



Required Skills and Experience



Strong background in construction, interior design, drafting, architectural support, or 3D design



Experience with AutoCAD 2D



Experience with 3D design tools



Experience with Canva



Experience with Photoshop



Understanding of measurements, plans, layouts, materials, and architectural/interior design concepts



Excellent spoken and written English



Strong client communication and presentation skills



Strong scheduling, follow-up, and calendar management skills



Strong organizational and leadership ability



Professional, reliable, detail-oriented, and responsible



Support Team Functions



The manager may help oversee and improve support roles such as:



Bookkeeping / Office Support



Social Media / Content Support



Client Follow-Up / Appointment Setting / Closing Support



Ideal Candidate



We want someone who:



takes ownership



follows through



communicates clearly



manages people well



understands design and construction



can speak professionally with clients



stays organized under pressure



helps the business grow



To Apply

Please send:

Your resume

A short voice recording in English

A short summary of your experience

Examples of your work in design, drafting, presentations, or related client support

Your WhatsApp number

Your internet speed and work setup

Your availability to start



***Important: Include this sentence in your application:

“I can manage operations, people, client communication, and design support.”



Applications without this phrase may not be reviewed.

title: Construction project coordinator
description:
I'll cut straight to it, we are looking to hire two new tea
mbers for long-term, 10 years plus. We are looking for like-minded tea
mbers, the right person for the right seat, while we are in the process of getting to greatness. You have to be self-driven with very high goals and willing to give it 110%, like the rest of our team. For the right person, this will be easy and work with our team; for the wrong person, you will hate it.



Do us both a favor and don't waste our time if you dont have the above, or share our core values and culture of standards.



Department: Project Management

Reports To: Project Manager (Senior PM / GM CC’d as required)

Location: Remote

Employment Type: Full-Time, Non-Exempt



Who is Team RRE?

We are team players who prioritize open communication while exercising emotional control. We do the right thing and are dedicated to winning. We are not perfect—we learn from our mistakes in the process of being great.



Team RRE Core Values

We Are Team Players

We Prioritize Open Communication

We Exercise Emotional Control

We Do the Right Thing

We Are Dedicated to Winning



Vision

To be the greatest nationwide, relationship-based electrical contractor with the best culture for our tea
mbers.



Purpose

To serve our clients with the highest level of communication and provide maximum value in order to build long-term, relationship-based partnerships.



What’s In It for You

Strong, winning Team culture

Permanent, full-time position

Growth opportunities as we expand locally and nationwide

Access to company health plan (Kaiser Permanente)

Dental and vision coverage

Retirement plan

Six paid holidays per year



Position Overview

The Project Coordinator is a critical support role responsible for relieving Project Managers of coordination, documentation, tracking, and field-support responsibilities so projects are executed efficiently, profitably, and professionally.

This role serves as a central communication hub between Project Managers, field tea
mbers, vendors, clients, and general contractors. Extreme organization, proactive communication, emotional control, and a strong desire to help Team RRE win are required.



Key Responsibilities & Tasks

Project Setup

Prepare job folders upon contract award and ensure all documents are properly organized in Google Drive.

Coordinate and distribute startup documentation, including:

Certificates of Insurance (including additional insured)

Business licenses

Joint Check Agreements

Team Introduction Letters

Communicate with material vendors (e.g., Platt) to establish job accounts.

Assist Project Managers with job costing worksheets and ensure Accounting loads projects into QuickBooks.

Prepare Statements of Values and load them into Google Sheets and Contractor Foreman.

Address and track all required submittals.



Tracking & Documentation

Track schedules and coordinate all active work.

Track daily site reports and store them in the appropriate folders.

Track site photos and organize albums by job phase and date.

Receive incoming job-related
s and route critical requests to the Project Manager per direction.

Update each job’s status line weekly.

Generate a Weekly Job Team Talk (WJTT) Google Doc for every active job, serving as the official weekly update.



Weekly Job Team Talks (WJTT)

Prepare, distribute, and track WJTTs for every job, every week.

Ensure WJTTs clearly communicate:

Job progress

Schedule status

Labor hours and production

Material status and deliveries

Risks, constraints, and next steps

Coordinate WJTTs with jobsite Leads and GC on-site supervisors as required.

Store all WJTT documentation in Google Drive per Team RRE standards.



Contractor Foreman Tasks

Load jobs into Contractor Foreman, including plans, documents, and communications.

Ensure Daily Logs are completed and tracked.

Load new field tea
mbers, assign roles, and verify system access.

Support onboarding by ensuring field tea
mbers can access the app and locate assigned jobs.

Keep Contractor Foreman clean and current as jobs close out.

Ensure end-of-month job inspections and percentage-of-completion updates are completed and posted.





Field Support, Materials & Equipment

Order and coordinate materials and equipment per approved job budgets.

Track material deliveries and equipment usage to support field productivity.

Monitor equipment rentals and usage to minimize unnecessary costs.

Assist Purchasing with large material orders, equipment vendors, pricing, approvals, and follow-ups.

Coordinate lodging and per diem requirements for field tea
mbers.

Assist with weekly mileage tracking and verification for payroll.

Receive and reconcile tooling lists; track missing tools, ladders, and equipment.



Change Orders & Financial Support

Prepare change orders for:

Time & Material work

Scope changes or additions

Overtime work

Equipment-driven requirements

Assist with retainage tracking, invoicing, collections, and Schedule of Values.

Prepare monthly progress billings (manager approval required).

Receive, review, and process payment applications.

Log and track all change orders from initiation through invoicing.



Training & Development

Demonstrates self-awareness of strengths and development needs.

Owns and actively manages a career path toward maximum potential.

Self-motivated, lifelong learner committed to continuous improvement.

Continuously upgrades job knowledge and emotional control.

Asks questions, communicates clearly, takes ownershipand dedicated to winning.



Knowledge, Skills & Abilities

Strong organizational and multitasking skills with attention to detail.

Proficient in Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive, Gmail) and Contractor Foreman.

Great written and verbal communication skills.

Take massive action to get things done.

Professional, tactful, and service-oriented client interaction.

Ability to build and maintain strong professional relationships with clients.

Emotional Control: Ability to manage personal emotions and positively influence others.



Education & Experience

Construction or electrical industry experience preferred; formal education not required.



Core Competencies

Very high productivity

Understands massive action

Strong ownership mentality

Great financial accountability

Calm under pressure

Organized and detail-oriented

Clear communicator

Team-first, solutions-driven mindset



Why Join Team RRE

Strong culture built on values, not ego

Growing company with a long-term vision

Leadership that cares about people—not just numbers

Opportunity to grow into senior leadership as the company scales

title: Legal Records Retrieval Specialist
description:
Codes Health is a well-funded, fast-growing US startup building the modern platform for medical records retrieval. We work with law firms and specialty healthcare providers to get records faster, with zero errors.



What You'll Do

What Success Looks Like

- Zero rework — complete, compliant document sets delivered the first time

- You're flagging process improvements, not just completing tasks



What We're Looking For

- Excellent communication skills — comfortable calling US-based provider offices and following up persistently through phone and

Why Codes Health

title: Video Editor Wanted for Finance YouTube Channel
description:
Hello,



My name is Neven Scagnoli, Co-Founder of LUZARI. We are a media company specializing in faceless YouTube channels in the technology and finance niche.



As we continue expanding our finance content, we are looking for skilled video editors who can help us produce high-quality, visually engaging videos.



What We’re Looking For

You should be able to take audio, scripts, screenshots, and screen recordings and turn them into a polished final video that is:

- Visually appealing

- Well-paced

- Enhanced with fitting graphics and sound effects

- Edited in a clean, modern, and professional style



It is especially important that you can:

- Create your own unique graphics

- Design visuals that match a consistent color palette and style

- Produce clean animations in After Effects

- Maintain a unified visual identity throughout the video



We do not just need someone who can cut clips together. We are looking for someone who understands how to make a video feel cohesive, premium, and engaging from start to finish.



Our videos are typically 4–10 minutes long, though we often prefer shorter, more focused content.



Work Expectations



We have a steady flow of work available and are looking for editors who can handle 2–3 videos per week.

It is absolutely fine if you have another job, as long as you can deliver consistently and maintain quality.



Pay Structure

- $25 per video

- Higher rates may be discussed for longer or more demanding videos



This is a serious long-term opportunity. Because we operate in the finance niche, the upside is significant. After 1 year of working with us, you will receive 5% revenue share from the channel, with the percentage increasing over time as long as you remain part of our team.



Our Team Values

- We care deeply about the people we work with. Our core values are:

- Honesty

- Transparency

- Strong work ethic

- Ambition

- High standards



We want to build a team where talented people can grow, earn well, and stay with us long-term.



Example Style

Please review our reference videos here:

- (!Unfortunately, you are not allowed to use external links, so I will send you this one in private DMs.)



If you can match this level of quality and editing style, you will 100% get a job with us! No doubt about it.



Trial Edit



We may ask selected applicants to complete a small test edit using material we provide, including:

- Script

- Audio

- Screenshots

- Screen recordings



The test is normally unpaid, but if you are hired, it will count as your first paid video.



Please only apply if you believe you can truly meet the standard shown in our references.



Interested?

Apply now, we are looking for multiple editors, not just one.



Best regards,

Neven Scagnoli

title: Remote Sales Development Representative (SDR | BDR | Appointment Setter | Cold Caller)
description:
Who We Are

StoryGen (www.storygen.agency/) is a performance-focused B2B outbound agency helping companies generate consistent, qualified sales opportunities through strategic cold outreach. We specialize in building reliable pipelines and cold calling is a core part of how we deliver measurable growth for our clients.



Our clients range from high-growth SaaS startups to established service providers in industries such as digital marketing, IT services, fintech, staffing, and consulting. When you join StoryGen, you don’t just work on one produc, you gain exposure to multiple industries, decision-makers, and proven outbound systems.



We are expanding our remote sales team and are hiring driven, phone-confident Sales Development Representative to execute outbound campaigns and consistently book qualified meetings.



The Opportunity

This is a metrics-driven outbound role focused heavily on cold calling. You’ll be the first point of contact between our clients and their ideal prospects , responsible for starting meaningful conversations and converting them into qualified sales meetings.



If you enjoy structured execution, measurable performance, and being accountable for real results, this role is built for you.



Key Responsibilities

- Execute high-volume outbound cold calls to B2B decision-makers

- Use structured call frameworks and objection-handling techniques

- Qualify prospects and schedule meetings that meet campaign criteria

- Maintain accurate and organized CRM records

- Send follow-ups and meeting confirmations to increase show rates

- Reconnect with warm leads to improve conversion performance

- Provide feedback and insights to improve targeting and messaging

- Collaborate with Account Managers to optimize campaign outcomes



What Makes You a Strong Fit

- Previous experience as an SDR, BDR, cold caller, or appointment setter

- Proven ability to meet call activity and booking targets

- Confident and professional communicator on the phone

- Comfortable handling objections and navigating gatekeepers

- Highly organized and disciplined with CRM updates and reporting

- Coachable and adaptable across different industries

- Reliable, consistent, and performance-oriented

- Experience with HubSpot, Slack, Coda, Calendly, or Nooks is a plus.



Compensation & Work Structure

- Base Salary: USD 1,000 per month

- Commission: Uncapped, paid per qualified meeting held

- Schedule: Monday–Friday, 8:30 AM – 6:00 PM (Eastern Time)



Location: Fully Remote



Work across multiple B2B industries and client campaigns

Defined advancement path to Senior SDR, Team Lead, and management roles

Collaborative, high-performance remote team environment



How to Apply

We use a skills-based assessment process to ensure a fair hiring experience. Please complete the assessment and submit the following in the same link:



- Your resume

- A screenshot or link to your internet speed test result

- A short Loom audio recording (questions provided in the link)



Apply here:

title: Entry-Level Admin Assistant / Associate Account Manager (Fresh Graduates, No Experience Required)
description:
About Us

StoryGen (www.storygen.agency) is a rapidly growing B2B lead generation agency specializing in building and managing outbound sales teams for our clients. Cold calling is our strength, but what truly drives our results is the operational engine behind it: organized systems, clear communication, and smart use of automation and AI tools.



Our campaigns succeed because they’re structured, tracked, and continuously improved. That’s where this role makes a real impact.



The Opportunity

We’re looking for a highly organized and proactive Admin Assistant / Associate Account Manager to help coordinate and support client campaigns behind the scenes.



This is an entry-level opportunity ideal for someone who is detail-oriented, tech-comfortable, and curious about sales, operations, and client management. You don’t need prior experience in account management, we’ll train you. What matters most is your ability to stay organized, communicate clearly, and take initiative.



You’ll work closely with Account Managers and our BDR team to ensure campaigns are properly set up, aligned, and running smoothly.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

Campaign Setup & Coordination

- Assist in launching outbound campaigns (scripts, ICP definitions, call lists)

- Help organize and maintain campaign documentation

- Ensure all messaging and instructions are clear and up to date



Content & Messaging Support

- Draft and refine cold call scripts and follow-up
s

- Edit outreach messaging for clarity and effectiveness

- Use AI tools to streamline copywriting and administrative tasks



Client & Team Support

- Join onboarding and weekly client calls to take structured notes

- Track action items and follow-ups fro
etings

- Support Account Managers in preparing client updates and reports



Performance Tracking

- Monitor weekly KPIs (meetings booked, held, show rates)

- Flag inconsistencies or performance issues

- Help maintain organized performance dashboards



Systems & Tools

- Assist with basic setup and troubleshooting in platforms like HubSpot or Nooks

- Use tools like ChatGPT to summarize calls, generate drafts, and improve efficiency

- Keep internal trackers and client folders structured and accurate



What We're Looking For

- Strong written and verbal communicator

- Highly organized and process-driven

- Comfortable learning and using new tech tools

- Curious about sales, outbound strategy, or account management

- Familiar with AI tools or willing to learn

- Detail-oriented and able to manage multiple tasks

- Independent problem-solver who asks smart questions

- Reliable and consistent in follow-through

- Positive team player with a growth mindset



Work Schedule

- Monday to Friday

- 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM Eastern Time



Compensation & Growth

- USD 1,000 monthly pay

- Fully remote

- Structured onboarding and hands-on mentorship

- Training in outbound strategy, account management, and AI tools

- Clear progression path:

Admin Assistant / Associate Account Manager ? Account Manager ? Senior Account Manager

- Opportunities to grow into strategic, client-facing, or operations-focused roles



Why Join StoryGen?



You’ll be part of a scaling agency where systems matter, execution is valued, and strong operators are recognized. If you enjoy bringing order to moving pieces and want exposure to modern outbound sales powered by AI, this role is a strong starting point.



How to Apply

To ensure fairness and reduce bias, we use an assessment-based hiring process.

Please complete the assessment and submit the following within the same link:



- Your resume

- A link to your internet speed test result

- A short Loom audio introduction (guide questions provided in the link)



Apply here:

Who We Are

We’re (www.storygen.agency/) a rapidly scaling B2B lead generation agency specializing in outbound sales programs powered by cold calling, automation, and AI-driven systems.



Our clients rely on us to build and manage high-performing Business Development Representative (BDR) teams that consistently generate pipeline. While outbound is what we’re known for, strong execution behind the scenes is what makes it all work.



That’s where our Operations team comes in.

This is a hands-on operations role focused on onboarding, system setup, process execution, and cross-team coordination. You’ll play a critical part in launching new client accounts and ensuring every campaign starts strong.

title: Virtual Client Success Manager
description:
Client Success Manager — Matador Solutions



About Us

Matador Solutions is a US-based marketing and technology consulting firm helping local businesses grow through smarter systems, better marketing, and operational clarity. We’re looking for a dependable, detail-oriented Client Success Manager to support our Founder in managing day-to-day operations, client campaigns, and performance reporting — helping keep the business running efficiently and clients happy.



Compensation: PHP 500 – 650 per hour (depending on experience)

Type: Full-time, remote



Role Focus

You’ll play a key role in client communication, campaign management, and overall business coordination.

We’ll provide training and systems to help you succeed — experience is always a plus, but attitude, reliability, and attention to detail matter most.



You’ll handle:

Inbound and outbound sales and onboarding calls (scripts and training provided).

 Ads and Google 
 campaigns — we’ll train you on setup, optimization, and reporting.

Assisting the Founder with daily operations, scheduling, and task management to keep projects on track.

Overseeing weekly fulfillment and reporting for ads, SEO, and CRM — ensuring insights are accurate, actionable, and easy to understand.

Collaborating with the creative team to test new offers, visuals, and audiences.

Managing GoHighLevel (GHL) CRMs — automations, pipelines, and data hygiene.

Coordinating between clients, designers, developers, and marketing specialists to ensure quality and timely delivery.

Performing quality control on deliverables before they go to clients.

Ideal Candidate



You don’t need decades of experience — we’ll train you on our systems and processes — but you should bring curiosity, consistency, and initiative.



You are:

Organized and proactive — able to manage multiple tasks and clients without losing focus.

Marketing-aware — understand (or eager to learn) digital advertising, reporting, and automation.

A strong communicator — fluent in English, both written and spoken.

Tech-comfortable — experience with tools like GoHighLevel, Meta Ads Manager, Google Drive, or Notion is helpful.

Self-driven — thrives in a fast-paced, entrepreneurial environment and enjoys learning new things.



Requirements



Fast computer (M1 or faster)

Dual monitors for efficient work

Excellent, natural English communication skills



How to Apply

Include “Matador Pro” in your subject line so we know you read the entire post.

Attach your resume and a short Loom video introducing yourself and demonstrating your English fluency.

title: Virtual Administrator / Appointment Specialist
description:
Virtual Administrator & Appointment Specialist - Empower Lives Through Martial Arts! (Part-Time, Potential for Full-Time)



Do you have a passion for helping others achieve their goals? Are you a highly organized, proactive individual with excellent communication skills? Join our team and help us empower lives through martial arts!

We are seeking a dynamic and enthusiastic Virtual Assistant to support our two Premier Martial Arts locations. This is a fantastic opportunity for a motivated individual to grow with our company, starting part-time with the potential to transition to a full-time position. If you're a problem-solver who thrives in a fast-paced environment and are excited about the positive impact of martial arts, we want to hear from you!



About Us:

At Premier Martial Arts, we're more than just a martial arts studio – we're a community dedicated to building confidence, discipline, and respect. We empower individuals of all ages to achieve their full potential through the transformative power of martial arts. We empower individuals of all ages, from toddlers to adults, to achieve their full potential through the transformative power of Martial Arts. Our experienced instructors provide personalized instruction in a supportive and challenging environment, fostering not only physical fitness but also mental strength and character development. We believe that martial arts is a journey of self-discovery, and we're committed to guiding our students every step of the way. We're proud to be a part of our local communities and to have a positive impact on the lives of our students.



About the Role:

As our Virtual Assistant, you will play a crucial role in the smooth operation of our studios and contribute directly to our growth. You will be responsible for a variety of tasks, including:



Appointment Setting: Managing class schedules, booking trial lessons, and handling appointment confirmations.



Sales Follow-Up: Following up with leads, nurturing potential students, and converting inquiries into memberships.



Outbound Sales Reach: Proactively reaching out to potential students through various channels (e.g.,
, social media, community outreach) to generate new leads.



General Customer Service: Providing exceptional customer service to current and prospective students, answering inquiries, and resolving issues promptly and professionally.



Account Management: Maintaining student records, tracking memberships, and managing billing information.



Administrative Tasks: Handling various administrative duties, such as data entry,
 management, and preparing reports.



Digital Marketing: As you grow with the role, you may have the opportunity to contribute to our digital marketing efforts, including social media management, content creation, and online advertising.



Qualifications:

Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English.

Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.  

Proven ability to multitask and prioritize effectively.

Proactive and self-motivated with a strong work ethic.

Problem-solving skills and a positive attitude.

Experience in customer service or sales is a plus.

Familiarity with martial arts or a passion for fitness is a plus.

Ability to work during our business hours in America with some flexibility.

Experience with CRM software is a plus.

Experience with Digital Marketing, social media marketing etc., is a plus but not required



Benefits:

Opportunity to work with a growing and dynamic organization.

Potential for advancement and increased responsibility.

Be part of a team that is making a positive impact on the community.

Opportunity for growth (part-time to start, with the potential to become full-time).



To Apply:

Please fill out this Google form and answer the questions to apply! 







Thank you so much and we are ready for you to start your martial arts journey!

title: General Virtual Assistant Needed :)
description:
I'm a wedding photographer and educator (podcaster and digital course creator) based in Canada and I'm in search of a virtual assistant who can help support sporadically when needed.



I'm looking for someone who gets energy and joy from providing others with the support they need to get tasks and projects started and done. It's less about the task at hand, but more about being a helping hand wherever needed.



Here are the types of tasks I can see needing support with when I need an extra hand:



- Setting up + improving automations within different software

- Help with general admin tasks as needed

- Uploading content to a Squarespace blog and keywording photos for SEO

- Updating relevant SOPs as we work together and if things change (I'll show you how to do this)



And possibly also...



- Editing podcast episodes in Descript

- Uploading podcast episodes to Podcast software and YouTube

- Creating reels in Descript from podcast clips



What I am NOT looking for:

* If you are disorganized or have difficulty with deadlines and structure, please do not apply.

* If you are NOT strong in communicating in English, please do not apply.

* If you have an unreliable internet source, please do not apply.



What I'm looking for:



* Working Smart and Efficient Performance is far more important than years of experience or length of a resume



* Dedicated, Detail Oriented, Loyal, On-Time, Organized, Hits Deadlines, Quick Learner, Problem Solver, Smart, strong in English.



* Interest in supporting with admin and software/tech tasks



As a heads up, tasks vary season to season. From May - October is my busy wedding season, and from November - April is the season I focus more on education and marketing, so the hours may vary from season to season.



I'm estimating that I have roughly about 5-10 hours of work available each week. Each week will vary. Sometimes I may need more if there is a big project we are launching, sometimes less.



If you end up being a great fit and show a high level of commitment, as my business grows, so will the tasks I have to offer you and the position could potentially evolve!



If this sounds like you, make sure to reply to this job post answering the following questions:



- How many hours of work are you looking for/available weekly?

- Are you available to work/be online from 6am EST to 1 pm EST?

- Does $6/hour CAD work for you?

- What are your FAVOURITE types of tasks to work in? What is your DREAM job? :)

- What are your least favourite types of tasks that bore you or drain your energy?

- How many hours are you currently working a week with other clients/at another job?

- Do you have experience editing videos/reels in Descript?

- Why are you excited to apply to this position? Why do you think you're the perfect fit?

- Do you have a strong internet connection?

- What is an inspirational quote that makes you happy? :)



Looking forward to your application!



- Sara

We are looking for long-term employees to join our team. There is a great deal of growth opportunity for those that consistently make a positive contribution to our company. We are seeking great candidates that will represent the company with great customer service and dedication.



Therefore, please apply the word strawberry before you introduce yourself. Read on to find out what tasks we expect you to perform, as well as the experience we feel is necessary for this job.



This is a Customer Support manager job where you would have to follow a very clear process to keep our customers happy, but which will become very simple when you understand every step.

Re-Amaze / G Suite (help desk CRM) Shopify (eCommerce platform) Slack (communication channel) ChatGPT (for prompts + translations) DeepL (for translation) PayPal (for managing disputes)

Handling customer complaints. Reporting on refunds/complaints. Responding to customer
s regarding refunds, tracking numbers, FAQs. Contributing to our documentation and improving our support processes. Respond to all customer inquiries in a timely, polite and accurate manner. Skilled in reporting into google sheets. Skilled in generating weekly reports per store. Demonstrate a high level of professionalism at all times.



We maintain an ETA of 24 hours so you must reply to the
s within this timeframe.

 templates

Be available for a minimum of 40 hours per week once you are asked to start working full-time, we will start with a two week trial and then turn from part-time to full-time. This means that in the ideal situation you are currently not working for other full-time jobs

s exchanged with the customer.

Justin, Max and Khiem

MUST HAVE — DO NOT APPLY UNLESS YOU MEET ALL OF THE FOLLOWING:

RESPONSIBILITIES:

YOU WILL THRIVE IN THIS ROLE IF:

title: Real Estate Market & Licensing Research Specialist
description:
Company Overview; 

We are a service based company seeking a highly analytical and detail oriented Real Estate Market & Licensing Research Specialist to support our investment and development initiatives. This role is ideal for someone passionate about real estate, market analysis, and helping identify profitable opportunities for investment and growth.



Position Overview:

This position focuses on conducting thorough research on real estate markets, property rehabilitation opportunities, and state-specific licensing requirements for certain programs. The ideal candidate is highly detail-oriented, great with numbers, experienced with the BRRRR Method (Buy, Rehab, Rent, Refinance, Repeat), understands basic construction pricing and workflow processes, evaluates auction properties, demonstrates out-of-the-box thinking, and is capable of performing in-depth research on programs such as Article 28 and Article 31, compiling step-by-step guides for licensing and approvals. The role requires strong follow-through to ensure all aspects of a project are completed from research to execution



Key Responsibilities



Conduct detailed real estate market research to identify the best-performing and emerging markets for investment



Provide comprehensive market analysis reports, including metrics such as average home prices, rental rates, property values, and local market trends



Research rehab (renovation) opportunities in targeted markets and estimate potential costs, returns, and project feasibility



Understand basic construction pricing, set up, and workflow processes to better evaluate rehab projects



Evaluate auction properties, identifying promising deals and assessing potential risks and returns



Prepare clear and organized Excel reports summarizing findings, including property data, rehab budgets, auction analysis, and deal breakdowns for management review



Perform state-by-state research on rules and procedures for obtaining licenses or approvals required to run certain programs (e.g., Article 28, Article 31, etc.)



Compile step-by-step guides detailing how to file and obtain necessary licenses or program approvals in each state



Present research findings and recommendations in a clear and concise format, using innovative approaches to problem-solving



 Follow through on all aspects of projects from initial research to final execution, ensuring accuracy, completeness, and actionable outcomes  

On-site engagement  from A-Z



Requirements:



Experience in real estate research, data analysis, or investment support



Strong understanding of market evaluation, property trends, and basic rehab cost analysis



Knowledge of basic construction pricing and workflow processes



Experience evaluating real estate auctions and identifying profitable opportunities



Advanced skills in Microsoft Excel (formulas, data organization, and presentation)



Proven ability to conduct independent, detailed research and summarize findings effectively



Excellent written and verbal communication skills



Strategic, detail-oriented, and solution-focused mindset



Demonstrated out-of-the-box thinking to find creative solutions and uncover unique opportunities



Great with numbers and experienced with the BRRRR Method



Fluent in American English (spoken and written)



Position Details:



Type: Full-time



Schedule: Monday to Friday



Hours: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM (1-hour lunch break)



Compensation: $550 USD per month (paid monthly)

title: Freelance Photo Culler + Editor Needed :)
description:
Hey there!



My name is Sara Monika and I am a wedding photographer and educator based out of Ontario, Canada and I'm in search of a passionate photo culler and editor who wants a long-term, stable working relationship in an organized and calm virtual working environment. 



You would be the primary photo culler, and the backup photo editor for when I have busier weeks than usual and I don't want to overwhelm my primary photo editor while keeping turnaround time on schedule. So you will receive all the culling projects, and then some editing projects as needed :)



I currently have 22 weddings booked for this year (2026) from June - November and an average of 3 sessions per month. This is what work I have guaranteed right now, but as I book more sessions and weddings, they will be added onto a task board right away so that you can see well in advance what I'll need help with and when it would be due, which will give you plenty of time to plan your life and other culling/editing projects accordingly around that.



As a heads up, I use an Ai editing tool to help me with the base edit so that the editing process is as efficient as possible. This means you would receive a Lightroom catalog with the images partially or mostly edited, but I still need help getting them fully completed through dodging and burning, cropping, straightening, temperature correction, and removing distractions in some images such as exit signs, etc.



Since the Ai editing tool will be taking care of the base edit, this means that it will take you less time per image to finish the edit to the standard I'm looking for since there will already be a strong base edit applied. For this reason I'm looking for someone who can fine tune these images for $0.15 CAD per image.



For culling, here is the flat rate payment structure depending on how many images you'd be culling for me:



0-500 photos: $6 CAD
photos: $12 CAD
photos: $18 CAD
photos: $24 CAD
photos: $30 CAD
photos: $36 CAD
photos: $42 CAD



Here is what I need help with:



- Culling on average 1200 images from each session (down to about 200) - turnaround time the day after each session

- Culling on average 4000 images from each wedding (down to about 800) - turnaround time the Monday after each wedding

- Fine tuning/editing about
photos per wedding in Lightroom using a preset I work with

- Fine tuning/editing about
photos per session Lightroom using a preset I work with

- Using dodging and burning tool, graduated filters, cropping, straightening, and making sure the Ai tool got the correct exposure and colour temperature (you will be trained on how I edit my photos)

- Object removal if there are distracting elements in photos



What I am NOT looking for:



* If you are disorganized or have difficulty with deadlines and structure, please do not apply.

* If you can't take honest feedback well and can learn quickly from the feedback, please do not apply.



What I'm looking for:



* Dedicated, Loyal, On-Time, Organized, Hits Deadlines, Detail Oriented, Creative, Quick Learner, strong in English

* Someone who takes responsibility for the work they do and doesn't make excuses

* Someone who prides themselves on being detail-oriented and creating consistent high quality results

* Someone who is EXCITED to cull and edit wedding and couples photos full of emotion and beauty :)

* Ideally someone who could support me with having a 5-7 business day turnaround time for weddings and a 2-3 business day turnaround time for sessions

* THIS IS A MUST: Someone who could have the cull ready for me the day after each session and the Monday after each wedding (you'll see the schedule in advance so you can plan ahead)



If this sounds like you and you'd love to connect more about this opportunity, reply to this job post answering the following questions:



- What's your
?

- How long have you been culling and editing for other photographers?

- Are you ok with seasonal work being mainly from May - October

- Are you looking for a long term stable working relationship?

- Does the $0.15 CAD per each image edited work for you?

- Does the culling payment structure listed above in CAD work for you?

- Are you ok with the required turnaround times for both culling and editing mentioned above?

- Do you have Lightroom and/or Photoshop?

- Why are you excited to apply to this position? Why do you think you're the perfect fit?

- Do you have a strong internet connection?

- Can you share examples of edited work that you enjoyed editing?

- What is an inspirational quote that makes you happy? :)



As a heads up, I will only be responding to applicants that I will select for the interview process, so if you don’t hear back fro
, I’ve d
 to go in a different direction. Thank you for your time!



Sara Monika

title: Real Estate VA - Cold Caller/Follow up
description:
# Follow-Up Specialist (Cold Calling) — Real Estate



**Status:** Full-time

**English:** Native or near-native (spoken & written)

**Shift:** Mon–Sat/Sun, with some late evenings (Eastern Standard Time)

**Compensation:** US$2.0–3.0/hour (DOE)

**Reports to:** Sales Manager

**Experience:** Real estate preferred, not required (training provided)



**Apply here (10 questions):

- You are expected to be on the phone all the time making outbound calls and follow-ups during your shift.



## Role Overview



You’ll make outbound calls and quick follow-ups to re-engage leads, build brief rapport, and gather the key info our closers need. You are **not** closing deals—you’re opening conversations, qualifying, and smoothly handing off to the acquisitions team.



## Key Responsibilities



* Make high-volume outbound calls and SMS follow-ups to warm/cold leads using our scripts.

* Engage prospects in **short, natural conversations** (60–180 seconds) to confirm motivation, timeline, property basics, and next steps.

* Qualify leads and **set call-backs/appointments or hand off** to a closer in the CRM.

* Take clean notes, update dispositions, and tag leads accurately in the CRM.

* Maintain daily activity targets (dials, talk time, dispositions, handoffs).

* Use objection-handling prompts to keep conversations going (no hard selling).

* Participate in coaching, role-plays, and weekly skill-building—**love learning** and bring a **problem-solver’s mindset**.



## What Success Looks Like (KPIs)



* Daily dials & talk time met or exceeded.

* Qualified handoffs/appointments set per shift.

* CRM notes are complete, clear, and same-day.

* Professional call etiquette and near-native English.

* Reliable on-time attendance and coachability.



## Must-Have Qualifications



* **Excellent English** (clear, confident, and friendly on the phone).

* Comfortable with **high-volume cold calling** and quick rapport building.

* Coachable, curious, and eager to improve; **enjoys problem-solving**.

* Organized and detail-oriented in CRM (can follow SOPs precisely).

* Solid tech setup: stable internet, quiet workspace, and a good headset.

* Able to work PST hours, including some late evenings and a weekend day.



## Nice-to-Haves



* Real estate lead gen or call-center experience.

* Familiarity with CRMs (GoHighLevel/Podio or similar).

title: Senior Salesforce Developer | US Real Estate CRM Specialist
description:
We are seeking a best-in-class Senior Salesforce Developer to lead the architecture, development, and long-term maintenance of our proprietary Real Estate CRM. This isn't just a coding job; we need a strategic partner who understands the US Real Estate market—from lead acquisition and automated follow-ups to contract-to-close workflows.



You will be responsible for building a "cradle to grave" system that manages every touchpoint of our business. This is a long-term, 40+ hour per week position for someone who wants to take full ownership of a sophisticated platform.



Key Responsibilities

Architect & Build: Design a custom Salesforce environment tailored to US Real Estate (high emphasis on Lead/Opportunity management).



Automation: Build complex flows and Apex triggers to handle high-volume lead routing and transaction management.



Integrations: Connect Salesforce with third-party tools (MLS, Zillow, Twilio/Sms, DocuSign, and marketing automation).



Deployment & Launch: Manage the full release cycle and ensure a smooth transition for our team.



Maintenance: Provide ongoing optimization, bug fixes, and feature updates post-launch.



Requirements (Must-Haves)

Salesforce Mastery: 5+ years of experience with Apex, Lightning Web Components (LWC), and advanced Flow Builder.



US Real Estate Domain Knowledge: You must understand terms like Escrow, MLS, Disclosures, Seller Leads, Wholesaling (if applicable), and the typical US sales cycle.



Problem Solver: You don't just take orders; you suggest "best-in-class" ways to improve the user experience.



Availability: Ability to work 40+ hours per week with a significant overlap with US business hours.



Communication: Fluent English with the ability to explain technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders.



Preferred Qualifications

Salesforce Platform Developer II Certification.



Experience building or managing "Real Estate Cloud" or similar custom REO/Lending platforms.



How to Apply

To ensure you have high attention to detail, please start your application with the word "ARCHITECT".



Briefly describe a Salesforce project you built from scratch.



Explain your experience with the US Real Estate industry.



Include a link to your portfolio or LinkedIn profile.

title: Social Media Content Creator Bridge City Health
description:
About Bridge City Health 
 6.5k followers)

Bridge City Health is a corrective chiropractic clinic that helps active adults (25–55) optimize their nervous system so they can do what they love, with the people they love, for a lifetime. We’re growing and want a dedicated social media manager who treats our brand like their own. This position has potential to grow into management of our doctor accounts as 
 @dr.andrewbaranski)



Role Overview

You will own our social media presence from strategy to execution:



Turn our mission and brand guidelines into consistent, on-brand content.

Create Canva graphics and short-form video (Reels-style) that educate, inspire, and convert.

Post on a clear schedule and track performance so we grow month over month.

This is not a “just post pretty things” role. You’ll be responsible for consistent output and measurable growth.



Key Responsibilities

Plan and maintain a monthly content calendar for Instagram &
 (and TikTok later).

Create:

Static posts & carousels in Canva

Reels / short-form vertical videos (simple edits, captions, hooks)

Stories and basic graphics for promotions, events, and testimonials



Repurpose: Turn clinic footage, photos, and patient wins into scroll-stopping content.

Post: Schedule content at agreed times, 5–6 days per week.

Analyze: Track KPIs weekly; propose simple tests (hooks, formats, posting times).



Brand: Follow and refine our visual + voice guidelines so everything feels “Bridge City Health.”



Collaborate: Meet with the CEO weekly to review performance, approve strategy, and get input on upcoming campaigns and offers.



Success Metrics (KPIs)

You win in this role when:



Consistency

5–6 feed posts per week, including 3+ Reels.

Daily Stories on weekdays.

Growth

Follower growth of at least 5–10% per month on key platforms.

Reach and impressions trending up month over month.

Engagement & Leads

Engagement rate improving (comments, saves, shares, DMs).

Trackable actions from social: DMs, inquiry forms, or booked new patient visits from social each month.

We’ll review KPIs together monthly. If inputs (content volume/quality) are consistent, we’ll tune the strategy to keep results climbing. 



Requirements

Proven experience managing social media for a brand (health, wellness, or local service a plus).

Strong Canva skills for carousels, posts, and story graphics.

Comfortable editing short-form video (Reels/TikTok style) using tools like CapCut, Canva, etc.

*Solid written English; can write clear, educational, and friendly captions.

Able to follow brand guidelines and also bring ideas for improvement.

Reliable, detail-oriented, and comfortable working independently.

Ability to overlap at least 2–3 hours with US business hours for check-ins.

Nice to Have

Experience with Meta Business Suite or similar scheduling tools.

Basic understanding of analytics (reach, saves, shares, CTR, etc.).



Compensation & Schedule

Competitive monthly salary in PHP, based on experience and portfolio.

Full-time role with stable, long-term potential.

Remote work with weekly Zoo
et check-ins.

title: Property Operations & Executive Assistant
description:
Property Operations & Executive Assistant

Full-Time | Stable Long-Term Role | Reliable pay, performance-based growth, and a professional environment built for long-term success



About the Role

We are looking for a Property Operations & Executive Assistant to oversee short-term rental performance while providing high-level executive support. In this role, you will optimize pricing and occupancy, manage vendors and guest experiences, and execute strategic initiatives that protect leadership time and maximize asset performance. This is a long-term, full-time opportunity for a decisive, analytical professional who thrives on ownership and results.



Key Responsibilities

Manage daily short-term rental operations, including guest communication, vendor coordination, maintenance approvals, and rapid issue resolution.

Optimize pricing strategies, listing positioning, and marketing efforts to maximize occupancy, revenue, and long-term property performance.

Approve and evaluate property expenses with strong financial judgment and cost awareness.

Manage executive priorities including scheduling, travel coordination, research, planning, and strategic initiative execution.



Must-Have Skills

Proven experience managing short-term rental operations, including pricing optimization and guest management.

Strong independent problem-solving skills with the ability to make sound operational and financial decisions without step-by-step direction.

Excellent written and verbal English communication skills with the ability to represent leadership professionally.

High systems intelligence and proficiency with property management software, task management systems, and AI productivity tools.



Nice-to-Have Skills (Bonus)

Experience with advanced dynamic pricing tools or revenue analytics for short-term rentals.

Background in hospitality, real estate operations, or asset management.

Experience providing high-level executive or personal support.

Tools You’ll Use

 or comparable task management systems

Work Schedule

Our Values

Resilience – Reliable and steady support for success.

Why You’ll Love Working Here

mbers say this is more than just a workplace — it’s a stable and professional environment where performance is recognized and growth is supported.

title: Creative Strategist – Part-Time (Remote)
description:
We're looking for a creative strategist to join [The Modern Freelancer](
/) — a media brand and performance creative studio helping B2B companies reach the freelancer market through
 and Instagram ads.



**What we do**



We license our audience and brand to select clients and deliver weekly ad creatives that drive real performance. We operate as a whitelisted partner — meaning our clients run ads directly through The Modern Freelancer's pages, lending our brand authority and audience trust to their offers.



**What you'll do**



* Spend time daily on IG, TikTok, and the
 Ad Library hunting for winning concepts and emerging formats



* Turn inspiration into clear, actionable creative briefs our designer can execute without hand-holding



* Write direct-response copy for static ads and short videos with text overlay — this is the core of what we produce



* Save and organize winning ad inspiration to our shared Foreplay board



* Occasionally write UGC briefs when the creative strategy calls for it, but this is the exception not the norm



* Review final assets before they go to the client to make sure everything is sharp



**You're a fit if you**



* Are genuinely obsessed with advertising and notice great ads before anyone tells you they're great



* Understand whitelisting and why a brand's page authority changes the creative strategy



* Can write a punchy hook that stops a scroll — on a static image or a 3-second text overlay



* Understand the freelancer and solopreneur mindset (bonus if you are one)



* Have some exposure to Meta ads — you don't need to have run campaigns but you need to understand what makes a performance creative work



* Communicate clearly and hit deadlines without being chased



**This is not for you if you**



* Need heavy direction to get started every week



* Think good design alone makes a good ad



* Have never spent time in the
 Ad Library



* Only have experience with UGC or influencer-style content



**To apply**



Send us a screenshot of 3 ads you've seen recently that you think are brilliant and tell us in 2-3 sentences why each one works. No formal cover letter needed — just show us how you think. Make sure to include "Donut" in your subject line.



Feel free to browse our Foreplay inspiration board to get a feel for the style and angles we gravitate toward: [foreplay.co/boards/0sYLHtCVkZMfl2p6sljv](app.foreplay.co/boards/0sYLHtCVkZMfl2p6sljv)

title: Grant Writer / Grant Specialist – Experienced / Executive Level
description:
Grant Writer – Experienced / Executive Level

Location: Remote (International applicants welcome)

Hours: 15 hours/week

Pay: $4–$5 USD per hour (based on experience) + performance-based bonuses



About Manifesting Serenity

Manifesting Serenity blends travel, sustainability, and wellness through purposeful exploration, mindset work, digital resources, events, and community experiences. Our mission is to help people explore the world thoughtfully, courageously, and in alignment with their values. From curated travel guides to immersive group trips and purpose-driven offerings, we are redefining how experiences shape personal growth and connection.

Website: 



The Role

We’re seeking a highly experienced, detail-oriented Grant Writer to support our mission-driven work through research, writing, and submission of grant proposals. This is an ideal role for someone who loves the craft of grant writing — identifying aligned funders, crafting compelling narratives, and adhering meticulously to guidelines.

You take pride in clean, professional writing and translating impact into fundable proposals. All work must be 100% human-written; AI tools (ChatGPT, Jasper, Claude, etc.) are strictly prohibited for the written work.

This role is best suited for someone who values long-term collaboration, steady weekly work, and contributing to meaningful initiatives, rather than chasing high hourly rates.



Key Responsibilities

Research and identify grant opportunities aligned with our mission and eligibility requirements

Review grant guidelines and summarize key submission requirements

Draft sections of proposals using templates and internal notes

Edit and proofread narratives for clarity, impact, and compliance

Assist with application assembly and submission checklists

Track deadlines, submissions, and outcomes



Required Skills & Experience

Advanced written English: impeccable grammar, clarity, professional tone

Strong research skills and exceptional attention to detail

Ability to follow instructions and templates precisely

Reliable communication and strong deadline management

Proficiency with Google Docs, spreadsheets, and online portals

Prior grant writing or nonprofit experience

Background in research, writing, or administrative support

Familiarity with U.S.-based nonprofits or foundations



Hours & Compensation

15 hours/week, flexible schedule as long as deadlines and submissions are met

Pay: $4/$5 USD/hour, depending on experience

Performance-based bonuses: Fixed “Win Bonus” awarded when a grant is awarded (not tied to award size and never commission-based)



Additional Benefits

Wage increases with tenure, integrity, and professional development

Holiday bonuses (after 3+ months with the company)

Virtual annual holiday party & wellness gathering (pending company growth)

Flexible scheduling within weekly hours

Birthday massage gift (after 6+ months)

100% remote work – no commuting

Creative and collaborative environment with opportunities to innovate



How to Apply

Please submit via platform only (do not
). Include:

Resume

Cover letter highlighting relevant experience and interest in Manifesting Serenity

Portfolio showcasing successful grants and outcomes (100% human-written)

Checklist of what I will need to have ready and available to support grant applications

Important: Use the subject line “Grant Awarded” in your application. Applications without this will not be reviewed.



This is a unique opportunity for a detail-driven grant writer to make a measurable impact at a mission-driven brand blending travel, wellness, and sustainability.

Best Wishes,

Serenity Lesley

title: Marketing- Social Media Content Developer & Video Editor
description:
About Us

Higher View Tax Services is not your average financial company. We’re a fast-growing, forward-thinking team that prioritizes excellence, connection, and creativity in everything we do. As we scale toward national goals, we’re looking for someone who can amplify our presence across key social media platforms and bring our brand voice to life with precision, strategy, and style.



Position Overview

We are hiring a creative and results-driven GHL Social Media Content Developer and Video Editor to join our marketing team. This role is responsible for creating scroll-stopping content, editing high-performing video assets, and managing content that drives engagement and conversions across
, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube. This position also requires hands-on experience with GoHighLevel, including using the platform to manage content, run ads, and support marketing automation efforts.



This role is ideal for someone who understands trends, algorithms, branding, and performance marketing, and who can turn simple ideas into dynamic content that converts.



Key Responsibilities



Plan, create, edit, and schedule engaging content for
, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube.



Edit short-form and long-form video content including reels, ads, YouTube Shorts, and educational videos.



Use GoHighLevel to support marketing efforts, including managing media assets, assisting with campaigns, and running ads through the platform.



Collaborate with internal tea
mbers to understand brand voice, goals, and messaging.



Develop and execute content and marketing strategies to increase engagement, leads, and followers.



Optimize posts and videos for reach, SEO, and conversions.



Stay current on social media platform updates, trends, and best practices.



Analyze performance metrics and provide insights and recommendations.



Requirements – Core Experience (Expert Level)



Minimum of 3 years of hands-on experience creating social media content for brands or businesses.



Proven portfolio of short-form and long-form video content (required).



Strong understanding of content strategy, not just video editing.



Ability to work independently, meet deadlines, and follow brand guidelines.



Comfortable receiving feedback and making quick revisions.



Demonstrated experience using GoHighLevel, including various platform functions and ad management.



Platforms and Social Media Expertise

Must have experience creating content optimized for Instagram (Reels, Stories, Carousel posts), TikTok, YouTube (Shorts and long-form), and
. Bonus experience includes LinkedIn and Pinterest. Must understand platform-specific aspect ratios, safe zones, trends, hooks, retention strategies, CTAs, caption structure, hashtag strategy, and basic analytics.



Video Editing and Design Tools (Required)

Expert-level proficiency in at least two of the following tools is required: Adobe Premiere Pro, Adobe After Effects, Adobe Photoshop, Adobe Illustrator, CapCut (desktop or mobile for professional use), Final Cut Pro, or Canva (professional, brand-driven use). Bonus tools include DaVinci Resolve, advanced Canva brand kits, and motion design tools.



Motion Graphics and Visual Skills

Must be able to create dynamic subtitles and captions, smooth transitions and cuts, zooms, overlays, callouts, simple motion graphics, and text animations. Must have a strong sense of pacing, storytelling, and visual hierarchy, and be able to match edits to a professional, bold, clean, and high-converting brand tone.



Content Types You Must Be Able to Produce

Short-form vertical videos, talking-head videos with captions, educational and explainer content, promotional and offer-based videos, testimonial and social proof content, trend-based content adapted to brand voice, branded graphics and thumbnails, and repurposed content from long-form videos into multiple short clips.



Audio and Video Quality Standards

Clean cuts, professional pacing, proper audio balancing, noise reduction, color correction, basic color grading, and exporting content in platform-optimized formats are required.



Workflow and Collaboration Tools

Experience using Google Drive or Dropbox for file management, project management tools such as Trello, Asana, or ClickUp, communication tools such as Slack or WhatsApp, and review tools like 
 (bonus). Ability to follow SOPs and naming conventions is required.



Bonus Experience (Highly Preferred but Not Required)

title: Amazon Online Arbitrage Product Sourcer (Full-Time Virtual Assistant)
description:
Amazon Online Arbitrage Product Sourcer (Full-Time Virtual Assistant)



This role is focused on product sourcing for Amazon Online Arbitrage (OA).

Your job will be to search online retail websites and identify products that can be purchased and resold on Amazon for profit.

You will analyze products using tools such as SellerAmp SAS, Keepa, Boxem, and Amazon data to determine whether each product meets the buying criteria.



DAILY RESPONSIBILITIES:



• Search online retail websites for profitable products

• Analyze products using SellerAmp SAS, Keepa, and Boxem

• Check ROI, profit margin, and sales rank

• Find products that meet the sourcing criteria

• Submit leads in a spreadsheet or sourcing sheet

• Avoid saturated or risky listings



AT THE END OF EACH SHIFT YOU WILL SUBMIT:



• A list of sourced products

• Product links with analysis data

• Notes when needed



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE:



This position is for experienced Amazon sourcers only.

• Amazon Online Arbitrage sourcing

• SellerAmp SAS

• Keepa product analysis

• Understanding ROI and Amazon fees

• Ability to identify profitable products

• Experience sourcing for Amazon FBA sellers

• Understanding Keepa charts and sales history

• Experience using Google Sheets



AMAZON ADMIN EXPERIENCE (PLUS):



Experience with Amazon Seller Central administrative tasks is a plus, including:

• Account health monitoring

• Prep center communication and coordination

• Inventory and order management

• FBM listing and fulfillment

• Purchasing





LEAD SHARING POLICY:



To prevent issues with shared leads, please include the following statement in your application:



"I understand that sourcing activity may be monitored using tools such as SellerAmp. If I am caught sharing leads or products with other sellers, I understand I may be reported to the platform and may lose future job opportunities."



WHAT THIS JOB OFFERS



• Stable full-time work

• Long-term opportunity

• Performance bonuses

• Opportunity for increased pay with strong results



In addition to the hourly rate, there are performance bonuses based on the quality of the products sourced.



Bonuses may include:

• Bonus for approved profitable leads

• Bonus for products that are purchased and perform well

• Increased pay over time for consistent performance

The better the sourcing results, the higher the earning potential.



HOW TO APPLY:



Please include the following:

• The number 17 in your subject line

• Your Amazon sourcing experience

• The tools you have used (SellerAmp, Keepa, etc.)

• The sourcing strategies you know

• Confirmation of the Lead Sharing Policy statement



Only applicants who follow all instructions will be considered.

title: Wellness/doctor Social Media Content Creator + Manager
description:
About Me / The 
 28k followers)

I’m a corrective chiropractor and CEO of Bridge City Health. My personal brand focuses on wellness, business, and lifestyle: helping people become healthier, higher-performing humans. I want a dedicated content partner to help me show up consistently online and turn my daily life and work into powerful content.



Role Overview

Your job is to build and maintain my personal brand content machine:



Turn my day-to-day (clinic, workouts, family, business) into short-form content.

Create Reels and Canva posts around wellness, lifestyle, and business.

Maintain a consistent look, feel, and message that matches my brand and Bridge City Health.

Track what works, scrap what doesn’t, and help me double down on winners. 



This role is for someone who loves social, understands trends, and can organize a busy founder’s content.



Key Responsibilities

Content Planning



Build a weekly content plan for Instagram,
, and TikTok (primary: Reels).

Create simple shot lists for me so I know exactly what to film each week.

Content Creation



Edit 4–7 Reels per week (hooks, captions, on-screen text, basic transitions).

Design 2–4 Canva carousels / static posts per week (quotes, tips, mini-lessons).

Pull content ideas from my existing clinic footage, personal photos, podcasts, and lives. 



Publishing & Optimization



Write captions in my voice (I’ll give examples and guidance).

Post/schedule content at agreed times.

Save and tag best-performing posts so we can reuse and spin off new versions. 



Collaboration



Weekly meeting with me to review performance, plan hooks, and align on topics.

Ask for what you need fro
 (clips, voice notes, ideas) so output never stalls.



Success Metrics (KPIs)

You’re winning when:



4–7 Reels + 2–4 Canva posts go out every week, consistently.

Personal account followers grow 5–10% per month.

Average views per Reel and engagement (comments, saves, shares) trend up month over month.

We have an organized content library with labeled “top performers” for easy reuse.



Requirements

Proven experience managing a personal brand or influencer-style account.

Strong short-form video editing (Reels/TikTok) using CapCut, Canva, or similar.

Good Canva design skills and strong sense of visual branding.

*Excellent written English; can match tone and style from examples.

Highly organized, proactive, and comfortable directing a busy founder on what to film.

Able to overlap at least 2–3 hours with US business hours for live check-ins.



Nice to Have

Experience in health, fitness, or wellness niches.

Familiarity with Instagram/TikTok trends and sounds.

With hundreds of travel resources, brand collaborations, and expanding media visibility, we are entering a new stage of growth and require experienced executive-level operational support.

Website:

Instagram (Me) 

 (Me)

Manifesting Serenity - FB Group 



THE ROLE

I am hiring a Full-Time Executive Virtual Assistant & General Operations Manager to provide high-level executive, communications, and operational support.

This is not an entry-level position. This role requires experience, independent execution, strong professional communication skills, and the ability to think strategically.

You will operate as an extension of me — representing the brand in written communication, managing inbound and outbound opportunities, coordinating operations, and protecting executive time.

This is a results-oriented position focused on growth, placements, partnerships, and operational excellence.



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

Manage daily inbound communication across
, social media, and messaging platforms

Research aligned opportunities and initiate proactive outreach

Track all outreach and leads within structured Google Sheets or CRM systems

OPERATIONS & ORGANIZATION

Participate in virtual tea
etings and execute action steps

MARKETING & MEDIA SUPPORT 

Support
 marketing campaigns

Support webinar and course engagement (future phase)

Analytics & Performance Reporting



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS 

Minimum 4+ years experience supporting executives, founders, or growth-stage brands

Bachelor’s Degree or higher required

Strong executive presence in written communication

Exceptional organizational and systems-thinking ability

Ability to work independently with minimal oversight

Experience managing multiple high-responsibility priorities simultaneously

High emotional intelligence and professional digital communication skills

Must be a woman or woman identifying (woman-led company seeking aligned team structure)



CORE EXPERTISE

Executive Calendar &
 Management

Lead Management & Strategic Pitching

Project Management & Task Coordination

Event Management & Marketing Support

Data Entry & Online Research

Systems Organization & Documentation

Partnership Relationship Management



BONUS EXPERTISE (PREFFERED) 

CRM software management and optimization

Basic bookkeeping or accounting familiarity

Travel planning and itinerary management

Media management & content production workflows

Graphic design fundamentals or creative direction support

Candidates with documented results (placements secured, contracts closed, partnerships developed) will be prioritized.



WORK EXPECTATIONS

Monday–Thursday (32 minimum hours) OR Monday - Friday (40 hours maximum) 

Responsiveness & engagement required between 6am–1pm PST (Seattle time) The other tasks are flexible with your time zone if you'd like.

24-hour advance notice required for time off

Consistent communication is mandatory

Failure to communicate for 48 hours during scheduled work time will result in termination

Integrity in time tracking and task execution is non-negotiable

This role is designed for experienced, self-led professionals who do not require micromanagement or frequent motivation.



COMPENSATION & PERFORMANCE STRUCTURE

$4–$5 per hour DOE

Performance bonuses tied to placements, contracts, and measurable growth outcomes

Efficiency bonuses tied to performance metrics

Loyalty-based pay increases

Overtime opportunities (pre-approved)

Holiday bonuses (after 3+ months)

Fully remote position

Payment Details:

Paid twice monthly (2nd and 4th Friday)

OnlineJobs.ph + PayPal

Monitask required (time tracking)



APPLICATION REQUIREMENTS 

Please submit:

Resume

Brief cover letter outlining relevant executive-level experience

Portfolio including:

Outreach and pitch examples

Documented results or placements secured

Content creation works

etc.

s for Manifesting Serenity and 3–5 aligned podcasts currently seeking guests

 Protection Exercise: Below is a simulated inbox snapshot. Draft responses and explain what you would escalate, delegate, or decline.

Best,

Serenity L.

CEO, Manifesting Serenity

title: Short-Form Video Editor (Flexible, Work Anytime)
description:
We’re hiring Short-Form Video Editors to help us edit short videos using AI editing software.



We are a U.S.-based real estate company with a high volume of short-form video content that needs to be edited consistently.



This role is fully remote, fully flexible, and task-based.



If you’re comfortable using AI tools and enjoy fast, repeatable work, this is a great opportunity.



What You’ll Be Doing

* Editing short-form videos using AI-powered editing tools

* Creating clean, engaging clips for social media

* Following simple formatting and style guidelines (provided)

* Delivering edited clips on time



No filming

No creative strategy required

Just efficient AI-assisted editing



Pay

$0.25 USD per minute of edited video

Examples:

* 1-minute video = $0.25

* 3-minute video = $0.75

* 4-minute video = $1.00



Most videos are 1–3 minutes long.

* Paid per completed video

* No limit on how many videos you can edit

* The more you edit, the more you earn



Schedule

100% flexible

* No set work days

* No required hours

* You want flexible, independent income

* You’re reliable and follow instructions well

* You want consistent work without pressure
