title: Structural Designer (Project-Based / Contract)
description:
All You Need Services, LLC is seeking a reliable and detail-oriented Project-Based Structural Designer to support residential and light commercial projects across Florida. This is a contract-based role ideal for professionals who can deliver accurate, permit-ready structural drawings aligned with Florida Building Code requirements.



The Structural Designer will collaborate with our Lead Designer, Professional Engineer, Designers and Project Managers to prepare complete structural plan sets ready for review, sign, and seal.



Key Responsibilities

• Prepare structural drawings and plan sets using AutoCAD and/or Revit for residential and light commercial projects.

• Develop foundation plans (monolithic slab, stem wall, etc.), framing layouts, and structural details based on engineer's calculations.

• Review boundary and topographic surveys to ensure proper structural placement.

• Assist in preparing permit-ready engineer plan packages for county submission.

• Implement revisions based on Professional Engineer and designers' markups and county comments.

• Support “After-the-Fact” and new construction projects as assigned.

• Maintain organized project files and version control within company systems.

• Perform basic quantity take-offs when required.



Required Qualifications

• Associate’s or Bachelor’s degree in Civil Engineering with proven experience in Structural Design

• Minimum 5 years of structural drafting/design experience (residential preferred).

• Strong proficiency in AutoCAD (Revit is a plus).

• Working knowledge of:

• Wood frame construction

• Concrete and CMU systems

• Florida residential construction practices

• Familiarity with the Florida Building Code (FBC) and local permitting processes.

• Ability to interpret structural calculations

• High attention to detail and strong organizational skills.

• Ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines.



Preferred Qualifications

• Experience with Lee County, Charlotte County, or similar Florida jurisdictions.

• Experience supporting permit submittals and responding to plan review comments.

• Familiarity with FEMA flood requirements and elevation coordination.

• Exposure to structural analysis software (ETABS, RAM, STAAD) is a plus.



Key Competencies

• Accuracy in permit drawings

• Strong coordination and communication

• Proactive problem-solving to avoid county rejections

• Time management in a fast-paced design environment

• Team collaboration with engineers and designers

title: Capital Development and Funding Specialist
description:

* Track deliverables, funding milestones, and deadlines

* Support negotiations, MOUs, and partnership discussions

Qualifications



* Proven experience in funding, capital development, grants, or partnerships

title: Grant Writer – All You Need Services
description:

All You Need Services is seeking a skilled and motivated Grant Writer to join our team. The Grant Writer will research, develop, and submit compelling grant proposals that align with our mission of providing construction, development, and community-focused solutions throughout Florida.

Ability to work independently while meeting deadlines.

Commitment to the mission and values of All You Need Services.

title: Scheduling Coordinator
description:
Sunflower Childcare Substitutes is seeking a dependable and highly organized Scheduling Coordinator to support our childcare centers and childcare substitutes.

This role is ideal for someone who communicates clearly, responds quickly, and thrives in a fast-paced, time-sensitive environment.

Schedule: Split shift required, between the hours of 6AM-6PM EST. All Times listed are in EST, as we operate fully on Eastern Standard Time. 

Monday - Thursday: 6:00 AM – 10:00 AM&  2:00 PM – 6:00 PM

Fridays: 6:00 AM – 9:00 AM & 2:00 PM – 7:00 PM





Responsibilities

• Monitor and respond to incoming staffing requests in real time

• Manage same-day call-offs and urgent coverage needs

• Communicate promptly with childcare centers to confirm requests are being worked on

• Schedule childcare substitutes quickly and efficiently



Provide excellent customer service

• Ensure all staffing requests are submitted through the official request form for proper tracking and follow-up



Qualifications

• Fluent in English (written and spoken) ( C2, advanced/mastery)

• Strong communication and organizational skills

• Ability to multitask and prioritize in a fast-paced environment

• Tech Savvy & comfortable using scheduling systems and digital tools such as slack, text, Avionte, Google Meets

• Bonus if you have experience in staffing, scheduling, childcare, or education support



Must have own computer with Microsoft Windows 11 or newer with high speed internet, and ability to access Google Meets

title: Tech - Talent Sourcer / Recruiter (Remote – Part-Time/Full Time, 4 Hours/Day minimum)
description:

Talaas (Talent as a Service) partners with startups, scale-ups, and global tech companies to deliver modern, efficient, and high-quality hiring support. We’re looking for a skilled Talent Sourcer / Recruiter who can identify, engage, and qualify top talent across product, engineering, commercial, and operational roles.



This is a remote, flexible role (minimum 4 hours per day) with training, mentoring, and strong commission-based earning potential.



About the Role



As a Talent Sourcer/Recruiter, you will play a key role in building pipelines, mapping markets, and supporting full-cycle recruitment for tech-driven organisations. You should already have solid experience with sourcing tools, boolean search, and candidate engagement strategies.



Key Responsibilities



Sourcing & Research

Build targeted longlists and shortlists across tech and startup roles.

Conduct deep-dive market research and talent mapping across regions and specialisms.

Source candidates through LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Juicebox, Paraform, and other outreach platforms.

Develop advanced boolean search strings and creative sourcing strategies.

Candidate Engagement

Reach out to candidates using personalised, high-conversion messaging sequences.

Track response rates and maintain well-organised candidate flows.





Conduct initial screening calls where required.

Recruitment Support

Provide structured reports, market insights, and structured pipelines.

Collaborate with the recruiter/hiring lead to refine search criteria.

Maintain records in ATS/CRM and track candidate movement accurately.



Requirements



Proven experience as a recruiter or talent sourcer (startup or tech experience is a major plus).

Strong command of sourcing methods, boolean search, and multi-channel outreach.





Confident using:

LinkedIn Sales Navigator

Juicebox (or other ATS/CRM's)





Paraform (highly beneficial and preferred)



Other lead-gen/sourcing tools (Apollo, SignalHire, etc.)

Excellent written English and strong communication skills.

Highly organised, proactive, and able to work independently.

Able to work a minimum of 4 hours per day (remote).





Nice-to-Haves





Prior experience working with fast-growing startups or scale-ups.

Exposure to hiring for tech, engineering, SaaS, Web3, or product roles.

Experience working within embedded talent or RPO-style models.

Familiarity with ATS/CRM systems (JobAdder, Bullhorn, Workable, Lever, Greenhouse).



What We Offer



High commission and bonus opportunities.

A flexible, remote role with consistent work.

Mentoring, training, and structured development

The chance to work on roles with global startups, scale-ups, and tech companies.

Modern tools, clear processes, and a supportive team environment.

title: Sales Team Administrator (Real Estate)
description:
Through our sourcing and endorsement process, you will be placed directly with a growing Property Management & Real Estate agency in New South Wales, Australia. You’ll receive ongoing coaching, clear standards, and a dedicated Success Manager so you can focus on doing excellent work and growing in your role.



About the Role

We are seeking a Sales Team Administrator to own the Listed-to-Settled workflow for the sales division. This fast-paced, deadline-driven environment requires someone who can manage enquiries, prepare sales documentation, coordinate marketing campaigns, and keep CRM data accurate—without constant direction.

You’ll track every milestone, anticipate next steps, ensure compliance, and keep operations running smoothly. This role requires proactive ownership, attention to detail, and the ability to execute outcomes, not just tasks.



Key Responsibilities

Manage property enquiries and sales communications with timely responses and consistent follow-up

Own the Listed-to-Settled workflow, ensuring all compliance requirements, documentation, and milestones are tracked

Prepare appraisal proposals, listing presentations, contracts, and sales documentation to support listing conversion

Coordinate property marketing campaigns, including portal uploads, advertising timelines, and social media content

Maintain CRM accuracy with detailed data entry, contact management, status updates, and reporting

Schedule appointments, appraisals, and sales-related meetings, coordinating calendars efficiently

Liaise with vendors, buyers, agents, and internal teams to move transactions forward

Monitor transaction progress and proactively flag risks, missing documentation, or delays

Identify workflow gaps and recommend process improvements to enhance operational efficiency



Requirements / Non-Negotiables

3+ years of NSW real estate sales administration experience

Strong knowledge of NSW real estate sales processes, compliance, and terminology

Proven experience managing real estate CRM platforms such as PropertyMe, Agentbox, or similar

Experience coordinating digital property listings and online marketing campaigns

High proficiency in Microsoft Office or Google Workspace

Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

Detail-oriented with strict adherence to compliance and documentation standards

Proactive, accountable, and able to manage deadlines without supervision



Full-time availability, Monday to Friday | 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM AEDT



Benefits

Competitive salary

Paid US holidays

Paid wellness days

Health & wellness allowance

Monthly profit sharing

AI, Operations, and Leadership upskilling

Dedicated Success Manager and long-term placement support



How to Apply

If you are an experienced NSW real estate sales administrator ready to take ownership of end-to-end sales operations and maintain flawless compliance, Apply and submit your resume. Only candidates meeting the non-negotiables will be considered.

title: Creative Performance Data Analyst (Amazon + Video Ads)
description:
About The Role:

We are looking for someone who enjoys thinking strategically — not just pulling numbers.

This is NOT a data entry role.

This is NOT a basic reporting  position.

We are looking for someone who can analyze advertising performance data and help us identify:

Why certain videos are winning

Why others are underperforming

What creative tests we should run next

You will be working directly with leadership and creative teams to support data-driven decisions.



Your Responsibilities:



Review weekly Amazon Sponsored Brand Video performance (CTR, CPC, CVR, Watch Rate)

Compare performance across keywords

Identify winning hooks and themes

Flag underperforming creatives early

Create simple, clean dashboards

Summarize insights in clear written English

Suggest creative “challenger” test ideas based on data



Required Skills:



Experience with Amazon Ads OR Meta Ads reporting

Strong dashboard skills (pivot tables, filtering, formulas)

Strong written/speaking English

Analytical thinking

Ability to explain insights clearly



Preferred (But Not Required):



Experience working with a marketing agency

Familiarity with video advertising

Understanding of creative testing strategies



Hours & Compensation:

10–20 hours per week

Long-term opportunity

Competitive hourly pay based on experience

Potential to grow into a larger strategic role



About Us



We are a U.S.-based video performance marketing agency that specializes in Amazon and paid social video advertising.

We don’t just create videos — we test, optimize, and improve performance over time. Our clients rely on us to drive measurable sales results.

We are looking for someone who understands that numbers tell a story — and enjoys finding that story.

title: Conveyancing Compliance Officer
description:
PropZap — Help Build the Compliance Backbone of a Company Scaling Across North America



PropZap is building a next-generation real estate platform designed to expand across North America.



We’re not building just another brokerage.



We’re building a modern real estate company powered by strong systems, disciplined operations, intelligent workflows, and long-term vision.



Every real estate transaction carries legal, financial, and regulatory responsibility.



Behind every successful closing is a file that is complete, organized, and defensible.



As we scale, maintaining that level of operational integrity becomes even more important.



That’s why we’re looking for someone who takes pride in building order, protecting compliance, and ensuring every transaction file stands up to scrutiny.



This role helps protect the integrity of the entire brokerage.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Role: Conveyancing & Compliance Officer

Location: Remote

Role Type: Full-Time / Long-Term

Compensation: TBD



We believe exceptional operators deserve exceptional compensation. As PropZap grows, we are willing to pay premium for people who consistently deliver high-quality work, protect compliance standards, and help strengthen the systems that allow the company to scale confidently.



Company: PropZap — Building the next-generation real estate platform for North America



--------------------------------------------------------------



Why This Role Is Important



Every real estate transaction produces a complex set of documents, approvals, and compliance requirements.



If those records are incomplete, inconsistent, or poorly documented, the brokerage is exposed to unnecessary risk.



This role ensures our transaction files are clean, complete, and defensible from acceptance through closing — particularly during the critical firm-to-close conveyancing phase.



You will also support brokerage compliance operations by ensuring documentation standards are followed and potential risks are identified early.



This role sits at the center of:



• Conveyancing readiness

• Compliance oversight

• Documentation integrity

• Operational coordination



If you enjoy bringing clarity and structure to complex documentation, this role will feel meaningful and impactful.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Your Core Responsibilities



Transaction File Compliance Review



You will review buyer and seller transaction files to ensure they are complete, accurate, and audit-ready.



This includes:



• Reviewing transaction files in SkySlope (system of record)

• Ensuring required documents are present

• Confirming documents are legible and properly executed

• Verifying files are named and stored correctly

• Ensuring amendments, waivers, and supporting documents match the executed contract set

• Checking deposits, dates, and contract details for consistency



Your goal is to ensure each file clearly reflects what occurred during the transaction and maintains a clean documentation trail.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Pre-Close Conveyancing Readiness



You will conduct pre-close readiness checks to ensure files are properly prepared before entering the final stages of conveyancing.



This includes:



• Identifying missing or inconsistent documents early

• Creating clear lists of outstanding items and responsible parties

• Re-checking files once corrections are submitted

• Monitoring for late-stage issues such as:

Missing signatures

Name mismatches

Missing waivers

Incomplete deposit documentation

Missing lawyer details

Conflicting dates



Your work helps prevent last-minute issues that could delay closing.



--------------------------------------------------------------



FINTRAC Oversight (AML / Client Identification)



You will enforce PropZap’s FINTRAC standards with a strict compliance approach.



Responsibilities include:



• Verifying identification requirements for all parties

• Confirming ID documents are clear and valid

• Ensuring names on ID match contract names exactly

• Confirming required information such as occupation and employer

• Ensuring FINTRAC references are properly recorded internally



You will also manage complex cases such as:



• Corporate parties

• Foreign buyers or sellers

• Name discrepancies

• Missing or unclear identification

• Time-sensitive transactions



Any suspicious or high-risk information must be escalated promptly.



--------------------------------------------------------------



External Law Office Coordination (When Required)



You may assist with coordination related to the conveyancing phase, including:



• Confirming lawyer contact information is recorded correctly

• Ensuring the correct contract set is available for closing

• Verifying key transaction information is consistent

• Assisting internal teams in resolving missing documentation requested by lawyers



Exact interaction with law offices may vary depending on internal workflow.



--------------------------------------------------------------



MLS & Listing Compliance (When Applicable)



You may also assist with brokerage compliance checks related to listings and marketing documentation.



This may include:



• Confirming listing documentation is properly stored

• Reviewing listing records for completeness

• Supporting brokerage documentation standards tied to listings

• Identifying potential compliance issues related to listing or marketing records



The scope of MLS or advertising compliance responsibilities may evolve as the brokerage grows.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Documentation Standards & File Hygiene



At PropZap, documentation matters.



If something affects:



• money

• deadlines

• conditions

• approvals

• compliance obligations



…it must be clearly documented in the system of record.



You will:



• Provide clear feedback when documentation standards are not met

• Request corrections when necessary

• Follow up to ensure gaps are resolved



Clean files allow teams to understand transaction status and risk quickly.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Escalations & Risk Monitoring



You will identify scenarios that require escalation, including:



• Missing FINTRAC documentation

• Money or trust-related ambiguity

• Potential misrepresentation or conflicting information

• Situations requiring legal interpretation

• Clients threatening complaints or legal action



Escalations should include a clear summary of the issue and supporting documentation.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Compliance Audits & Quality Assurance



You may periodically review files to maintain compliance standards.



This may include:



• Performing internal file audits

• Identifying recurring documentation issues

• Monitoring patterns of missing information

• Flagging operational risks early



These reviews help keep the brokerage compliant and defensible.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Process Improvement



You will also help strengthen operational systems by identifying patterns and inefficiencies.



This includes:



• Tracking recurring compliance gaps

• Suggesting improvements to checklists and templates

• Supporting updates to internal SOPs

• Helping teams maintain consistent documentation standards



Your insights help the company improve how transactions are handled as we scale.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Who This Role Is Great For



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys structure, detail, and keeping complex documentation organized.



Strong candidates often have experience in:



• Real estate conveyancing

• Transaction coordination

• Brokerage compliance

• Legal or documentation-heavy administrative roles



Key strengths include:



• Exceptional attention to detail

• Strong organizational skills

• Clear written communication

• Comfort working with sensitive personal information

• Good judgment when escalating regulated issues



--------------------------------------------------------------



Tools & Systems



You will primarily work with:



• SkySlope (transaction file system)

• Slack (internal communication)

• Notion (Task tracking, SOPs and documentation)



--------------------------------------------------------------



What You Gain



• Long-term role inside a growing real estate platform

• Direct collaboration with operations and brokerage leadership

• Opportunity to strengthen systems that support company growth

• A role where your work protects the integrity of real estate transactions



As the company expands across markets, the importance of strong compliance and documentation systems grows — and the people who build those systems grow with it.



--------------------------------------------------------------



How to Apply



Send the following to: 



• Resume

• Portfolio (if applicable — examples of conveyancing, compliance, or documentation work)

• Summary of relevant conveyancing or compliance experience

• Expected monthly compensation

• Internet speed test link

• Any DISC test result (if available)

• Intro video (optional but strongly preferred)



Subject Line: Conveyancing Compliance Officer – Your Name



--------------------------------------------------------------



If you want to help build the compliance backbone of a real estate platform that is scaling across North America — and grow with a company that values operational excellence — we’d love to hear from you.

title: Part-time Maintenance Coordinator & Real Estate MLS Specialist
description:

title: Digital Marketing Manager
description:
Apply Here to be entertained: 



Summary of the Role



Hire Highs is looking for a proactive, results-oriented Digital Marketing Manager to step into a "player-coach" role. This position is crucial for enhancing the company's internal operational efficiency and providing execution expertise for client engagements. You will focus heavily on managing day-to-day execution tasks, creating foundational content, and taking a leadership role in marketing-related functions to reduce the current operational bottleneck on senior leadership, including Albert. Your goal is to become a thought partner to US leadership, not simply an executor.



Key Responsibilities & Execution Tasks

This role will primarily focus on hands-on execution and operational enablement to support the growth and delivery process:



Capacity Enablement & Delegation Absorption: Directly and immediately absorb operational and hands-on marketing execution tasks from senior leadership, specifically Albert. The measure of success for this role is the measurable freeing of Albert's time to focus on strategic, high-leverage activities.

Operational Tool & JD Creation: Reduce the existing bottleneck by creating comprehensive, thoughtful Job Descriptions (JDs) and scenario-based application/assessment questions for specialist roles, particularly in digital marketing and graphic design.

Digital Marketing Execution: Directly execute and manage core digital marketing functions, including:

Website creation and Search Engine Optimization (SEO).

Social Media and Paid Ads planning and deployment.

 marketing and automation flow implementation.

Lead Generation Support: Run the scalable lead generation and outreach engine, including list building, sequence design, and follow-ups, to ensure a repeatable, team-run process.

Content and Thought Leadership: Develop content and thought leadership materials, such as LinkedIn posts, case studies, and newsletters, while ensuring the efforts are low-maintenance and team-run.

Project Management & Coordination: Oversee marketing projects and teams (which may include web developers, designers, and other Virtual Assistants).

Automation & Efficiency: Look for opportunities to build automations to improve team and client efficiency, thereby helping the overall lean team move forward.

Client Management: Handle client communication for digital marketing projects.





Required Skills and Qualifications



Experience: Proven, extensive experience (e.g., seven years) in digital marketing, encompassing SEO, websites, social media, paid advertising, and
 marketing.

Managerial Acumen: Experience in managing people or teams is highly preferred.

Strategic Alignment: Must clearly understand that the role's primary focus is execution and supporting the client's existing strategy, as Hire Highs does not develop high-level strategy for the client's business.

Growth Mindset: An interest in growing within the company, potentially evolving into more than a manager.

Technical Proficiency: Familiarity with a range of digital marketing tools and platforms (e.g., those mentioned in the applicant pool like Manatal or specific ad platforms).

title: We're Hiring: Bookkeeper (Real Estate)
description:
Do you have a sharp eye for detail and a passion for keeping numbers balanced? We’re looking for a Bookkeeper who thrives in a fast-paced, growth-driven environment and wants to be a part of a team that’s transforming real estate through innovation. 



This is your chance to join a goal-oriented and supportive team where accuracy, organization, and accountability make all the difference.  



If you’re looking for perks and other payoffs: 



1. Healthcare Package 

2. Annual Performance-Based Pay Increase 

3. Flexible Paid Leave – we trust you to balance focus and rest 



And you have what it takes to be successful: 



1. Strong organizational, verbal and written communication skills (Your “clients” include both Skymount and out stakeholders) 

2. Solid experience in bookkeeping or accounting, preferably with general real estate bookkeeping exposure 

3. QuickBooks Certification (required) and strong working knowledge of QuickBooks, Excel, and accounting systems 

4. Familiarity with classes and projects in QuickBooks (huge plus) 

5. Self-discipline, excellent time management, and resilience under deadlines 

6. A strong problem-solving-mindset, because you won’t just enter numbers, you’ll help identify financial issues, propose solutions, and work alongside leadership to keep projects on track 

7. Ability to work at least 6 hours per day on the night shift. 

8. Confidence in working independently while communicating clearly and collaborating with the team when needed. 



Then you can easily ace these duties and responsibilities:  



1. Recording daily financial transactions with accuracy 

2. Maintaining and reconciling accounts, ledgers, and bank statements 

3. Preparing invoices, track payments, and manage accounts payable/receivable 

4. Generating financial reports to support decision-making 

5. Collaborating with the team to ensure compliance and smooth operations 

6. Keeping clean, well-organized financial records 

7. Supporting audits and tax preparation when needed 



But wait, there’s more! (Not something you have to ace, to be honest) 



>Desktop/Laptop (i5 or Ryzen 5+, 8GB RAM minimum) 

>Dual monitors for multitasking 

>Windows 10 or newer 

>Stable internet connection (75+MBPS + backup connection) 

>Noise cancelling headset 

>Quiet, dedicated home office 



If you think you’re the one we’re describing here, then don’t just stare at your screen and grab this opportunity to be one of us! 



TO APPLY: 



Respond to this post 



Use Vocaroo to answer the following questions. Attach the link of your recording (NOT MORE THAN 5 MINS.) to your response or
. 



1. Imagine a client’s account doesn’t reconcile at the end of the month. Walk us through how you would approach fixing it. 

2. If you notice a financial or inconsistency issue that could impact leadership decisions, how do you communicate it? 

3. Do you prefer working independently or collaborating closely with a team? Why? 



Send us a copy of your latest resume for our reference. 



WE’RE LOOKING FORWARD TO HEARING FROM YOU! 



-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 

WHO IS SKYMOUNT? I’ll give you a better one, WHY SKYMOUNT? 

 

At Skymount, our culture is more than buzzwords—it's grounded in deeply rooted values that shape every decision we make and every relationship we build. We believe in People First, always putting empathy, humility, and humanity above ego. Whether it's a teammate, a client, or a seller, we treat everyone with dignity and lead them with kindness. We live by a Growth Mindset, both our business planning and our daily showing up— challenging ourselves to learn, evolve, and become better versions of ourselves, both as individuals and as professionals. Radical Transparency is part of our DNA; we believe in open and honest communication to build trust, even when the discussions are difficult. And on the hard days (because they inevitably do exist), we dig in and tap into our Grit—refusing to give up, regardless of the obstacle in our way. These aren’t platitudes on a wall; these are the standard we hold ourselves to and the energy we bring to all we do. We don’t just work at Skymount—we live out our values together.

title: Content Creator & Digital Media Specialist
description:
Job Opportunity: Content Creator & Digital Media Specialist

Full-Time (40 Hours/Week) | Remote – Philippines

Compensation $5/hour USD (paid bi-weekly via Payoneer or PayPal)

Schedule 40 hours/week (Full-Time). Must overlap 9:00 AM – 2:00 PM Eastern Time.

Location Remote (Philippines)

Primary Focus Create, edit, publish, and manage multimedia content across multiple IGE brands; maintain WordPress sites, online magazine updates, and podcast distribution/RSS.

Reports To Max Fortune, CEO – Innovative Global Entities (IGE)



About Innovative Global Entities (IGE)

You will be supporting Max Fortune, CEO of Innovative Global Entities (IGE) — a multifaceted enterprise managing 16 active brands including Get Biz Credit, Reimagine iT Inc., Excel Media Group, Affluential Magazine, Mind Your Business Podcast, and the upcoming BizSocials (TM) platform.

The flagship initiative you will support is Fundable Futures — a 12-month program designed to empower underserved and veteran-owned businesses through capital readiness, strategic growth, and long-term success.

Role Summary

We are seeking a highly skilled Content Creator & Digital Media Specialist who can plan, produce, edit, publish, and optimize content across social media, web, podcast, and online magazine channels. This role combines creative production with hands-on execution: you will build high-quality assets (graphics, reels, flyers, video edits), publish and schedule content, update WordPress websites weekly, and maintain podcast distribution and RSS feeds.

Key Responsibilities

1) Social Media Content Creation & Publishing

• Create social media posts, carousels, stories, and short-form videos (Reels/TikTok/Shorts) for multiple IGE brands.

• Develop and maintain weekly content calendars; write captions, calls-to-action, and hashtag sets aligned with each brand voice.

• Schedule and publish content across Instagram,
, TikTok, LinkedIn, YouTube, and additional platforms as assigned.

• Engage with comments, DMs, and brand mentions; escalate time-sensitive inquiries to leadership when needed.

• Repurpose podcast and program content into high-performing social assets (clips, quote cards, promo reels, recap posts).

2) Video Editing & Podcast Production Support

• Edit podcast videos into full-length episodes and short promotional clips for social media (vertical and horizontal formats).

• Add polished elements such as captions/subtitles, lower thirds, intro/outro bumpers, transitions, and basic motion graphics.

• Export and deliver final video files optimized for each destination platform (YouTube, TikTok, Instagram,
, LinkedIn).

• Coordinate file management and version control for media assets in Google Drive/SharePoint/Dropbox.

3) Graphic Design, Flyers & Layout Production

• Design professional flyers, social graphics, thumbnails, and campaign visuals using Photoshop and/or comparable tools.

• Produce layout-ready designs for the online magazine using Adobe InDesign (or a comparable layout platform).

• Prepare print-ready and web-ready exports (PDF, PNG/JPG) with correct dimensions, readability, and brand consistency.

• Create slide-based assets when needed (PowerPoint) for promotions, sponsor updates, and internal reporting.

4) Website & Online Publishing (WordPress Required)

• Update WordPress websites weekly (podcast website and online magazine), including posts, pages, images, embedded media, and basic formatting.

• Perform light website edits such as menus, layouts, and page builder updates (e.g., Elementor or comparable tools).

• Publish new magazine content (articles, issue updates, featured stories) and ensure content is properly categorized and SEO-friendly.

• Troubleshoot basic site issues (broken embeds, image sizing, formatting inconsistencies) and coordinate escalations for technical fixes.

5) Podcast Distribution & RSS Feed Management

• Maintain podcast RSS feed accuracy and distribution across major podcast directories and platforms.

• Post episode titles, descriptions, show notes, links, and artwork updates; ensure consistency across platforms.

• Support content syndication workflows and verify successful publishing and propagation of updates.

6) Reporting, Systems & Collaboration

• Track performance metrics and provide weekly reporting (basic KPIs, top posts, growth observations, next-week priorities).

• Communicate status and deliverables clearly via Microsoft Teams and shared trackers (Google Sheets/Excel).

• Use ChatGPT and/or AI tools to accelerate drafting and ideation while maintaining accuracy, tone, and brand integrity.

• Follow SOPs, file naming conventions, and internal workflows; maintain strong attention to detail in every deliverable.



Required Tools & Technical Proficiency

• Adobe Photoshop (required)

• Adobe InDesign (required) — or comparable professional layout tool with proven portfolio examples

• Adobe After Effects (required) — or comparable motion graphics tool (portfolio required)

• Video editing workflow (Premiere Pro, CapCut, DaVinci Resolve, or comparable)

• WordPress (required) — including page builders such as Elementor or comparable

• Microsoft Teams (required)

• PowerPoint (required)

• Google Workspace (Drive, Docs, Sheets) and/or Microsoft 365

• Scheduling and publishing tools (Meta Business Suite, Buffer, Later, Hootsuite, or comparable)

You Must Be

• A creative producer with strong visual taste who can execute quickly without sacrificing quality.

• Highly organized and dependable — able to manage multiple brands, deadlines, and asset pipelines.

• A strong written communicator — professional English writing is required.

• Tech-savvy and resourceful — comfortable learning new tools and following SOPs.

• Accountable and proactive — you take ownership and communicate issues early.

Minimum Requirements

• 2+ years of proven experience in content creation, social media, or digital media production (portfolio required).

• Demonstrated ability to create short-form video content and edit podcast video clips.

• Demonstrated WordPress website editing experience (weekly update workflows required).

• Demonstrated layout design capability (InDesign or comparable) for magazine or publication-style content.

• Reliable computer capable of handling creative workloads and fast, stable internet.

• Ability to work full-time and overlap with 9:00 AM – 2:00 PM Eastern Time.

Performance Expectations (First 30–60 Days)

• Produce and publish a consistent weekly content cadence across assigned brands (posts + reels + stories).

• Deliver a weekly set of podcast clips with captions and platform-specific formatting.

• Update the podcast website and online magazine website weekly with new content and optimizations.

• Maintain accurate podcast RSS feed publishing, episode metadata, and show notes.

• Provide a brief weekly recap report with progress, metrics, and next-week priorities.

Compensation & Benefits

• $5/hour USD (paid bi-weekly via Payoneer or PayPal)

• Paid holidays after 90 days (Full-Time)

• Annual performance review and raise eligibility

• Work with purpose across a portfolio of globally impactful brands

How to Apply

 your application to: 

Subject line: Application – Content Creator & Digital Media Specialist

• Updated CV/Resume (PDF preferred)

• Brief cover letter (3–5 sentences) explaining why you are the best fit

• Portfolio links (required): reels/video edits, flyers/graphics, and any magazine/layout or WordPress work

Application deadline and start date: (insert/confirm before posting).

Content Creator Skills Test (Required)

Instructions: Complete the tasks below carefully. Submit your work in a single Google Drive folder within 24 hours of receiving this test. Attention to detail, visual quality, and clarity of communication will be evaluated.

Folder Setup

• Create a Google Drive folder titled: Content Creator Skills Test – [Your Full Name]

• Set sharing to: Anyone with the link can view

• Include a short README document listing what you submitted and the tools you used

Task 1 – Social Media Post Pack (Design + Copy)

• Create 3 social media posts for one brand of your choice (Get Biz Credit, Affluential Magazine, or Mind Your Business Podcast).

• For each post, provide: (a) the visual asset, (b) platform choice, (c) caption, and (d) 5–10 relevant hashtags.

• Upload as PNG/JPG and include captions in a Google Doc or PDF.

Task 2 – Reel/Short Video Edit (Podcast Clip)

• Provide a 30–60 second vertical video clip edit (reel/short). Use any sample footage you already own (do not use copyrighted TV/music).

• Must include: subtitles/captions, hook text, and clean audio leveling.

• Export as MP4 (vertical 9:16).

Task 3 – Flyer Design (Professional Layout)

• Design one 8.5"×11" flyer promoting a business credit workshop or podcast episode (your choice).

• Use Photoshop and/or InDesign (or comparable). Provide both a print-ready PDF and a web PNG.

Task 4 – WordPress Publishing & Website Update (Screenshots)

• Demonstrate your WordPress editing experience by providing screenshots of work you have done (or a sample on a staging/demo site).

• Show: creating/updating a post, adding an image, embedding a YouTube video or podcast player, and formatting headings/links.

• Include a brief 5–8 step written workflow describing how you perform weekly website updates.

Task 5 – Podcast RSS & Distribution Knowledge (Short Write-Up)

• Write 150–250 words explaining how podcast RSS feeds work and how you would update episode titles/descriptions and verify distribution.

• Include the key platforms/directories you have experience with (if applicable).

Task 6 – Attention to Detail (Editing)

Rewrite the paragraph below in perfect English with correct grammar, punctuation, and capitalization:



"our team is releasing new podcast episodes weekly and expanding our online magazine. we need consistent content, clean edits, and accurate publishing across all platforms."

Bonus (Optional) – 1-Minute Introduction Video

• Record a 1-minute video introducing yourself and explaining how you stay organized while producing content for multiple brands.

• Upload an unlisted Loom or YouTube link in a text file titled: Video Link.txt

Submission Instructions

• Confirm all files are viewable.

•
 your folder link to 
 to confirm submission.



Equal Opportunity: We evaluate candidates based on skill, professionalism, reliability, and quality of work.

title: Marketing Assistant / Ad Researcher & Copywriter (TikTok + Ads Library)
description:
We are looking to hire a marketing assistant who is obsessed with studying viral content and winning ads.

Your job will be to find what is already working online and help our team turn those ideas into new ads.

You will spend most of your time researching:

• TikTok

•
 Ads Library

• competitor ads

• viral video hooks

Your goal will be to constantly send our team new winning ideas, hooks, and ad formats we can recreate.

If you enjoy studying viral content and understanding why videos get millions of views, you will love this role.



What You Will Do

Your daily responsibilities will include:

• Searching TikTok for viral videos and ad concepts

• Identifying hooks with millions of views

• Documenting winning ad structures

• Researching competitor ads in
 Ads Library

• Finding new ad templates we can recreate

• Organizing examples for our video editing team

• Occasionally helping write simple ad scripts

You will help our team constantly discover new winning ad concepts.



What We Are Looking For

You must have strong English skills and be comfortable communicating clearly with the team.

You should enjoy:

• researching viral content

• studying what makes videos perform well

• spotting patterns in successful ads

Bonus if you have experience with:

• TikTok research

• ad copywriting

• marketing research

• social media trend analysis

You do not need to be an expert copywriter, but you should be curious and analytical.



What Success Looks Like

Success in this role means:

• constantly discovering new ad hooks and formats

• helping the team find new winning ideas

• building a large library of ad inspiration

Your work will directly help our editors and marketers create better ads.



Hiring Process

1. Accomplish the application form below that includes:

- A few background and experience questions

- About Me Loom video

- Compensation expectations

2. You will receive an
 communication about an initial interview

3. If you got through the initial screening, you will receive an
 for a paid trial task. We will ask you to complete a paid test task where you will likely do some research work.

4. After a paid trial, you will get a confirmation on your candidacy status.



Growth Opportunity

We are growing fast and this role can eventually grow into:

• marketing strategist

• copywriter

• creative strategist

depending on your interests and performance.



To apply, please fill out this application form: wkf.ms/3OPO99W



WE ONLY PROCESS APPLICATIONS VIA THE FORM PROVIDED.

title: Executive Operations Assistant (Right-Hand to Founder)
description:
Remote – Full Time

Work Schedule: California Time (PST)



About the Role



This role is best suited for someone who enjoys building systems and helping a founder stay organized. If you prefer strictly task-based work, this may not be the right position.



We are looking for a highly proactive Executive Operations Assistant to work directly with the founder of a growing group of companies in the mortgage, finance, and technology sectors.



This is not a basic virtual assistant position.



You will serve as the founder’s right-hand operator, helping organize ideas, build systems, execute projects, manage communication, and ensure the business runs smoothly day-to-day.



This role is best suited for someone who enjoys building systems and helping a founder stay organized. If you prefer strictly task-based work where instructions are always provided step-by-step, this position may not be the right fit.



The right candidate is someone who is extremely organized, proactive, resourceful, and comfortable figuring things out independently.



You should be comfortable researching solutions, contacting vendors, learning new software tools, and helping implement systems that improve efficiency across the business.



This role will begin with operational support and has the potential to grow into a Chief of Staff, Operations Manager, or Head of Operations role for the right person.



If you enjoy building systems, solving problems, and helping scale a business, this could become a long-term leadership opportunity.



Key Responsibilities



Executive Support



Manage the founder’s calendar, inbox, and priorities

Help organize daily, weekly, and quarterly priorities

Ensure important tasks and deadlines are never missed

Provide daily accountability check-ins with the founder

Organize notes, ideas, and projects fro
etings and discussions



Operations & Systems



Help design and implement business systems and processes

Build and maintain Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs)

Assist with automation setup and workflow management

Identify inefficiencies and recommend improvements

Document processes so future tea
mbers can follow them



Client & Loan Support



Assist with gathering client documentation

Communicate with clients to request documents and follow up

Update CRM systems and maintain organized client records

Help track loan pipelines and ensure files move forward smoothly

Coordinate with lenders, vendors, and partners when necessary



Project Execution



Turn ideas from the founder into structured projects

Research tools, vendors, and systems

Attend webinars or trainings when needed and summarize key insights

Help implement new tools, software, or workflows



Team Coordination



Help coordinate virtual assistants and contractors

Assist with hiring and onboarding new tea
mbers

Monitor task completion and ensure accountability across the team

Escalate important issues to the founder when necessary



Communication Requirements



Because this role may involve communicating with clients, partners, and vendors, strong spoken English is required.



Candidates must be comfortable speaking on the phone and occasionally interacting directly with clients when needed.



You should have:



• Clear and professional spoken English

• A neutral or American-sounding accent

• Confidence speaking with clients on phone calls or video calls

• The ability to communicate professionally and represent the company well



While you will not be responsible for sales calls, you may occasionally assist with client communication, follow-ups, document requests, or coordinating information with lenders, partners, or vendors.



If you are not comfortable speaking on the phone or interacting with clients, this position may not be the right fit.Required Skills & Traits



We are looking for someone who is:



Extremely organized

Highly proactive

Resourceful and independent

Comfortable learning new software quickly

Confident communicating with people

Comfortable asking questions and solving problems

Detail-oriented

Able to manage multiple priorities

Reliable and trustworthy



This role requires someone who does not wait for instructions but instead takes initiative to identify problems and move things forward.



Communication Requirements



Because this role involves communication with clients and business partners, strong spoken English is required.



Candidates should have:



Clear and professional English communication

A neutral or American-sounding accent

Confidence speaking with clients on calls when necessary



Software & Tools (Preferred Experience)



Experience with the following tools is helpful but not required:



CRM systems

GoHighLevel

ClickUp or other project management tools

Google Workspace

Automation tools

AI productivity tools



The most important skill is the ability to learn tools quickly and implement systems effectively.



Work Schedule



Full-time position

Must be available during California (PST) business hours



Compensation



Starting hourly rate: $5 – $7 per hour depending on experience.



Performance reviews will occur at:



90 days

6 months

12 months



Tea
mbers who demonstrate strong performance, initiative, and reliability will be eligible for hourly rate increases during these review periods.



In addition to hourly compensation, tea
mbers may also receive performance-based bonuses based on factors such as:



• Exceptional initiative and problem solving

• Successful project execution

• Helping improve systems and operations

• Supporting business growth and efficiency



Our goal is to reward tea
mbers who take ownership of their role and contribute meaningfully to the growth of the company.



This role is designed for someone who wants to grow with the company long-term and take on increasing levels of responsibility.

Growth Opportunity



This role has the potential to grow into:



Operations Manager

Chief of Staff

Head of Operations



You will work directly with the founder and gain experience in:



Business operations

Systems building

Automation

Finance and lending

Business strategy



Application Instructions



To apply, please complete ALL of the following steps.



1. Video Introduction (2–3 minutes)



Record a short video explaining:



Your professional background

Why you believe you would be a strong right-hand operator

Your experience supporting founders or executives



2. Written Response



Describe a system or process you helped improve in a previous role.



3. Problem-Solving Challenge



Imagine you are my Executive Operations Assistant and I ask you to help improve how our team tracks tasks and projects.



Write a short response explaining:



What questions you would ask me to understand the current system

What tools you might recommend for managing tasks and projects

How you would organize tasks so the team stays accountable and nothing falls through the cracks



We are not looking for a perfect answer. We want to understand how you think and approach problems.



4. Attention Check



Start your application with the phrase:



Systems Builder



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



Final Note



We are looking for someone who wants to grow with the company long-term.



If you are someone who enjoys building systems, solving problems, and helping a business scale, we would love to hear from you.

title: Real Estate Inside Sales Agent (ISA) | Sierra Interactive & BatchDialer Specialist
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a high-energy, persistent, and tech-savvy Inside Sales Agent (ISA) to join our growing U.S.-based real estate team. Your primary mission is to convert website traffic and cold leads into qualified appointments for our field agents. You won't just be "dialing numbers"; you will be nurturing relationships and managing a sophisticated lead pipeline.



Key Responsibilities

Outbound Prospecting: Making 150+ dials per day to new website leads and cold lists.



Lead Nurturing: Following up with "warm" leads who have engaged with our site but aren't ready to buy/sell yet.



CRM Management: Updating all lead activity, notes, and tasks within Sierra Interactive.



Power Dialing: Efficiently navigating BatchDialer and managing lists in BatchLeads.



Qualification: Identifying motivation, timeline, and financial readiness using our proven scripts.



Required Qualifications

Experience: At least 2 years of experience calling U.S. real estate leads (ISA or Cold Calling).



Tools: Proven proficiency in Sierra Interactive, BatchDialer, and BatchLeads is a massive plus.



Schedule: You must be able to work Eastern Standard Time (EST) without exception.



Communication: Exceptional English verbal and written skills. You must sound confident, professional, and empathetic on the phone.



Internet: Stable high-speed internet (25 Mbps+) with a backup power solution and a noise-canceling headset.



Preferred Personality (DISC Profile)

We find that the most successful ISAs on our team typically rank:



High D (Dominance): To handle rejection and stay focused on the goal.



High I (Influence): To build quick rapport and sound enthusiastic.



How to Apply (Strict Requirements)

To be considered for this role, you must reply with the following. Applications missing any of these will be automatically disqualified:



Updated CV/Resume: Highlighting your real estate ISA experience.



DISC Analysis: A PDF or screenshot of your DISC results (you can take a free one at 
 or 
).



Video Sample: A 60-90 second video introducing yourself. Tell us about your experience with Sierra Interactive and BatchDialer, and why you’re the best fit for this role. (Use Loom or a YouTube link).



Internet Speed Test: A screenshot of your current speed from Speedtest.net.

title: Virtual Assistant  – Dispatch + Customer Service + Admin (NEMT/Medical Transport)
description:
Title



Full-Time Virtual Assistant (Philippines) – Dispatch + Calls + Customer Service (Medical Transport/NEMT)



Company



Golden State Medical Transport — a growing non-emergency medical transportation (NEMT) company serving Los Angeles, Orange County, and the Inland Empire (California).



Role Summary



We’re hiring a full-time Virtual Assistant to handle day-to-day dispatch coordination and customer service. You’ll be making and receiving calls, sending
/text updates, confirming transport details, and keeping our schedules accurate .



This is a fast-moving operations role. Our schedule changes daily, so you must be organized, calm, and responsive.



Responsibilities

 • Calls: Coordinate with facilities, case managers, and clients (confirm pickups, resolve schedule changes, get room/department details, etc.)

 •
 & Text: Send confirmations, ETA updates, and follow-ups professionally and quickly

 • Dispatch Support: Organize trip requests and assign/confirm scheduling based on availability

 • Data Accuracy: Update Google Sheets with patient/trip details, notes, statuses, and changes

 • Documentation: Write clear driver notes (pickup instructions, contact info, special needs)

 • Problem Solving: Handle last-minute changes, delays, and reschedules with good judgment

 • Other admin tasks as needed (light billing support, follow-ups, organizing records)



Required Skills & Setup

 • Excellent English communication (spoken + written)

 • Confident on phone calls (professional tone, clear pronunciation)

 • Strong Google Sheets skills + attention to detail

 • Fast learner, reliable, and able to follow SOPs

 • Stable internet + quiet workspace + headset

 • Available for full-time work and able to respond quickly during shift



Schedule

 • Full-time (40 hrs/week)

 • Flexible start times required (dispatch volume varies; schedule isn’t fixed every day)

 • Weekend availability required (rotating/as-needed)



Preferred (Nice to Have)

 • Dispatch/logistics experience (transportation, rideshare, delivery, NEMT, healthcare scheduling)

 • Familiarity with HIPAA/confidentiality mindset

 • Experience working with US clients/time zones



How to Apply (Follow Instructions Exactly)



Please send:

 1. Resume + a short intro (2–4 sentences)

 2. Your internet speed + confirmation you have a headset and quiet workspace

 3. Answer these questions:

 • What hours are you available in PH time Monday–Friday?

 • Are you available on weekends if needed?

 • Rate your Google Sheets skill 1–10 and explain why

 • Describe any dispatch/call center/customer service experience

 

 4. Sample Task (Required): Write a short response (2–4 sentences) to this message:

“Hi, can you confirm pickup for tomorrow at 10:45 AM from Foothill Regional to Anaheim Point? Patient is wheelchair, 151 lbs.”



Hiring Process

 • 2–3 day paid trial (real tasks with supervision)

 • Long-term position if it’s a fit

title: Customer Experience & Order Specialist
description:
CUSTOMER EXPERIENCE & ORDER SPECIALIST

Remote · Full-Time · Philippines

Schedule: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Pacific Time | 8 Billable Hours/Day



ABOUT SILKCARDS

SilkCards (Designline Graphics Inc.) has been setting the standard for premium custom print for over 25 years. We serve B2B clients — executives, brand builders, and creative professionals — who demand more than a product. They demand an experience. We are expanding our remote operations team and looking for sharp, communicative, client-obsessed professionals based in the Philippines.



THE ROLE

You are the bridge between a client's vision and a flawless finished product. From the 
nt a client places an order to the 
nt it lands at their door, you ensure every interaction reflects the SilkCards standard. This is not a passive inbox role — you are proactive, detail-driven, and genuinely invested in making every client feel like their brand matters.



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING



- Order Intake & Verification — Review orders for payment accuracy and confirm artwork files meet pre-press specifications before handoff to production.



- Proactive Communication — Reach out to clients ahead of deadlines or file issues before they become problems. You anticipate; you don't just react.



- Multi-Channel Support — Handle inquiries via
, live chat, and phone. Educate clients on our products, paper stocks, and finishing options (full training provided).



- The Concierge Mindset — When a client asks about a business card, you ask about their brand. You build context, build relationships, and make sure they have what they need to succeed.



- Elegant Problem Resolution — When something goes wrong, you investigate with a solution-first mindset and make the resolution process seamless for the client.



- Record Keeping — Maintain thorough, accurate records of all client interactions within our order management system.



WHO YOU ARE



- A natural communicator — fluent, idiomatic English in writing and speech. You sound like a knowledgeable peer, not a script.

- Detail-obsessed — you catch file errors and payment discrepancies that others miss.

- A "Yes, And..." thinker — you anticipate the next question before it's asked.

- Cool under pressure — you can turn a frustrated client into a loyal one through empathy and quick action.

- Tech-comfortable — experienced with order management platforms and multi-channel communication tools.



REQUIREMENTS

- Fluent, idiomatic English — written and verbal (non-negotiable)

- Proven customer service experience, preferably B2B, e-commerce, or custom manufacturing

- High-speed, stable internet connection + quiet, professional workspace

- Available on a fixed US schedule: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Pacific Time (8 billable hours/day)

- Comfortable managing
, live chat, and phone simultaneously



- BONUS: Familiarity with graphic design terms (CMYK, bleed, vector, resolution)

- BONUS: Experience representing a premium or luxury brand



WHY THIS ROLE IS DIFFERENT



The technical side of this job is trainable. What we cannot teach is the genuine desire to make someone's experience feel effortless and elevated. We are a premium brand — and every client touchpoint reflects that. We want people who take pride in the work, who thrive when trusted to represent something exceptional, and who understand that a well-handled customer interaction is its own kind of craftsmanship.



HOW TO APPLY

Submit your application with your resume and a brief introduction.



- Bonus points: Tell us about a time you turned a difficult customer situation into a great outcome. We want to hear how you handled it.



Click here for more detailed info of the position

title: Accounting & HR Support Specialist (Remote – Hawaii-based)
description:
Here is the same description adjusted for a remote role.



***



## Job Title  

Accounting & HR Support Specialist (Remote – Hawaii-based)



## Location  

Remote within Hawaii (Preference for Maui-based candidates)



## About Maui Paradise Properties  

Maui Paradise Properties is a locally owned, service-focused vacation rental and real estate management company. We operate with aloha, integrity, and a strong commitment to owners, guests, and our team.



## Position Summary  

The Accounting & HR Support Specialist provides remote day-to-day support to the finance and human resources functions, with a focus on accurate, timely accounting and high-quality employee support. This role requires strong QuickBooks skills, advanced Excel capabilities, reliable internet, and the ability to work independently while handling confidential information with discretion.



## Key Responsibilities  



### Accounting (Primary)  

- Enter and process accounts payable (vendor bills, owner expenses, utilities, and other invoices) in QuickBooks.  

- Prepare and process electronic payments to vendors and owners; ensure proper approvals and supporting documentation via digital workflows.  

- Assist with accounts receivable, including posting receipts, recording remote deposits, and monitoring outstanding balances.  

- Perform bank, credit card, and other account reconciliations on a regular schedule.  

- Maintain and organize digital accounting records, supporting schedules, and reconciliations in shared cloud folders.  

- Assist with monthly close, including journal entries, accruals, and account review.  

- Support preparation of internal financial reports and spreadsheets for management.  

- Use advanced Excel skills (pivot tables, lookups, complex formulas) to analyze data, create reports, and support budgeting/forecasting.  

- Assist with tax and regulatory filings support (reports and backup for CPA, vendor 1099 support, GET tracking) as directed.  



### Human Resources Support  

- Assist with onboarding of new employees and contractors remotely, including preparing electronic paperwork, collecting digital documents, and coordinating virtual orientation.  

- Maintain accurate and up-to-date digital personnel files and HR records, ensuring confidentiality.  

- Support payroll processing by preparing timesheet data, verifying hours and rates, and coordinating with the payroll provider.  

- Respond to routine employee questions regarding payroll, timekeeping, policies, and benefits via
, chat, or video call, escalating issues when needed.  

- Assist with tracking PTO and other leave, and maintaining HR-related spreadsheets and logs.  

- Help coordinate job postings, candidate screening logistics, interview scheduling, and virtual interviews as requested.  

- Support HR compliance by following internal procedures and assisting with required digital notices, acknowledgments, and trainings.  



## Qualifications  



- 2+ years of experience in accounting, bookkeeping, or a similar role; HR support experience preferred but not required if willing to learn.  

- Strong proficiency in QuickBooks (Online or Desktop via remote access) including AP/AR, reconciliations, and reporting.  

- Advanced Excel skills, including pivot tables, VLOOKUP/XLOOKUP, SUMIFS, and data analysis.  

- Familiarity with payroll processes and HR administration is a plus.  

- High level of accuracy, organization, and attention to detail.  

- Ability to handle sensitive information with discretion and maintain confidentiality in a remote setting.  

- Strong written and verbal communication skills, comfortable with
 and video calls.  

- Ability to prioritize, meet deadlines, and work independently with minimal supervision.  

- Experience in property management, vacation rentals, or real estate is a plus but not required.  



## Work Style & Culture Fit  



- Comfortable working remotely with cloud-based systems and collaboration tools.  

- Service-minded attitude toward owners, guests, vendors, and tea
mbers.  

- Reliable, accountable, and proactive in identifying and solving issues.  



## Schedule & Compensation  



- Full-time remote role (typical Monday–Friday schedule on Hawaii time, with flexibility as needed).  10am-6pm HST.

- Compensation commensurate with experience, plus benefits package (to be defined by company).  

-13th months pay

-2 weeks paid vacation after 1 year

-2-3% cost of living allowance annually

-$100 monthly medicare allowance



To apply: please respond to this ad with your resume.

title: General Virtual Assistant Needed for Wedding Photographer :)
description:
Hey there! :)



I'm a Wedding + Portrait Photographer and Educator based in Canada and I'm in search of a passionate virtual assistant who wants a long-term, stable working relationship in an organized and calm virtual working environment.



I'm looking for someone who gets energy and joy from providing others with the support they need to get tasks and projects started and done. It's less about the task at hand, but more about being a helping hand wherever needed.



The position involves about 40% creative tasks and about 60?min/tech tasks so it's a good balance!



As a heads up, tasks vary season to season. From June - October is my busy wedding season, and from November - April is the season I focus more on education and marketing so the hours may vary from season to season.



It's currently my slow season so I may have about 5-8 hours a week of work available at the 
nt until mid May, but that will shift to about 10-20 hours from June - November. Each week will vary. Sometimes I'll need more help, and other weeks less help. Please let me know in your application if the seasonal hours work for you :)



Here are tasks I'll be needing help with (training and SOPs will be provided):



- Wedding slideshow creation (I'll provide the software)

- Help with general admin tasks as needed

- creating cheat sheets for me in Google docs from questionnaires clients submitted

- calculating and logging mileage

- manage wedding client prep workflows to ensure we are on track and on time with projects

- Creating carousels from wedding photos in Canva (I will provide templates and guidelines for you to start with)

- Saving expense invoices into Dropbox

- setting up automations

- Uploading content to the blog and keywording photos for SEO

- Updating relevant SOPs as we work together and if things change (I'll show you how to do this)



What I am NOT looking for:



* If you are disorganized or have difficulty with deadlines and structure, please do not apply.

* If you are NOT strong in communicating in English, please do not apply.

* If you have an unreliable internet source, please do not apply.



What I'm looking for:

* Someone LOVES working with wedding photos, and who is just as excited to support me with the admin, automation, and research tasks!

* Working Smart and Efficient Performance is far more important than years of experience or length of a resume

* Dedicated, Detail Oriented, Loyal, On-Time, Organized, Hits Deadlines, Quick Learner, Problem Solver, Smart, strong in English.

* Having Lightroom and Photoshop is a big bonus!



If you end up being a great fit and show a high level of commitment, as my business grows, so will the tasks I have to offer you and the position could potentially evolve to a consistent part-time or full-time position!



If this sounds like you, make sure to reply to this job post answering the following questions:



- What's your
?

- How many hours of work are you looking for/available weekly?

- Are you available to work/be online and reachable from 6am EST to 2 pm EST on weekdays?

- Does $5.50/hour CAD work for you?

- What are your FAVOURITE types of tasks to work on? 

- What are your least favourite types of tasks that bore you or drain your energy?

- How many hours are you currently working a week with other clients/at another job?

- Do you have Lightroom and/or Photoshop?

- Why are you excited to apply to this position? Why do you think you're the perfect fit?

- Do you have a strong internet connection?

- What would be your DREAM job? :)

- What is an inspirational quote that makes you happy? :)



Looking forward to your application!

- Sara

title: Account Manager / Campaign Strategist (Client Success & Growth)
description:
About StoryGen

StoryGen (www.storygen.agency/) is a B2B lead generation agency that builds and manages outbound sales programs for companies across multiple industries. We specialize in cold calling, supported by structured systems, performance tracking, and AI-powered tools to drive consistent results.



We partner closely with our clients to create scalable outbound systems that generate qualified opportunities and measurable growth.



The Opportunity

We’re hiring a Remote Account Manager / Campaign Strategist to take full ownership of client campaigns, from initial strategy to ongoing optimization and growth.



This is not a passive account management role. You’ll act as a strategic partner, performance driver, and internal team leader, ensuring every campaign is aligned, continuously improving, and delivering measurable ROI.



If you understand outbound deeply, think in systems, and enjoy turning data into direction, this role is for you.



What You’ll Do

Client Strategy & Leadership

- Lead onboarding calls and campaign kickoffs with clarity and structure

- Translate client goals into actionable outbound strategies

- Run performance reviews and guide clients through data-backed decisions

- Build strong, long-term client relationships rooted in trust and results



Campaign Development & Optimization

- Develop Ideal Customer Profiles (ICPs) and outbound targeting strategies

- Build and refine cold call scripts and
 sequences

- Use BDR feedback and campaign metrics to iterate messaging

- Identify performance gaps and implement optimization plans



Execution Alignment

- Brief BDR teams clearly on targeting, scripts, and expectations

- Partner with List Building to ensure high-quality prospect data

- Work with Operations to improve systems, workflows, and tooling

- Monitor performance daily and adjust quickly when needed



Performance & Reporting

- Analyze KPIs and campaign metrics

- Deliver concise, strategic client updates

- Turn insights into next-step recommendations



What Makes You a Strong Fit

- 1–2 years of real B2B cold calling experience (you’ve been on the phone and know objections firsthand)

- 2+ years in Account Management, Client Success, or Campaign Management within B2B services, lead gen, or sales outsourcing

- Strong scripting and copywriting skills for outbound campaigns

- Deep understanding of ICP development and outbound prospecting strategy

- Excellent communication skills, you can lead calls and guide conversations confidently

- Organized and detail-oriented, capable of managing multiple accounts simultaneously

- Comfortable working remotely with tools like HubSpot, Slack, Coda, Calendly, Nooks, Aircall, and similar platforms

- Tech-savvy and comfortable leveraging AI tools to increase efficiency



What We Offer

- Base Salary: USD 1,500/month

- On-Target Earnings: Up to USD 2,000/month (performance-based bonuses)

- Fully remote role with a global team

- Clear systems, structured processes, and operational support

- Real growth opportunities as StoryGen scales



Work Schedule: Monday–Friday, 8:30 AM–6:00 PM Eastern Time



How to Apply

We use structured assessments in our hiring process to promote fairness and reduce bias.

To apply, complete the assessment and upload the following within the same link:



- Your resume

- A link to your internet speed test result

- A short Loom audio introduction (questions provided in the link)



Apply here:

title: Graphic Designer - AI & Native Ads (DTC E-commerce)
description:
We are a growing DTC e-commerce brand in the health and wellness space. We’re looking for a highly skilled Graphic Designer who can create a high volume of high-performing static ads AND native-style “ugly” ads for Meta/Facebook—creatives that blend into the feed, stop the scroll, and drive conversions. 



To be considered, you must include the word “RDM” in the title of your application.



About the Role

This role is not about making things “pretty.” It’s about making creatives that sell at scale. You will be expected to generate multiple static ads on a daily basis.



You’ll design:



Clean, high-converting static image ads



Raw, native-style ugly ads that don’t look like ads



You’ll work closely with our team to turn hooks, angles, and ad copy into visuals that perform. If you understand direct response design, know how to leverage AI for rapid asset generation, and know when polished works vs. when ugly wins, this role is for you.



What You’ll Be Designing



Direct response static ads (image + text overlays) highlighting products like our lung cleansing spray



Native / ugly image ads (raw, unpolished, feed-blending creatives)



Before / after comparison ads



Testimonial and review-based creatives



Screenshot-style, notes-style, WhatsApp-style ugly ads



Headline-driven clickbait ads



Educational infographic-style ads



Hook-first scroll stoppers for cold traffic



What You’ll Own



Creative Output: Create attention-grabbing native ad images that generate high CTRs. You will develop both simple designs and more complex compositions with advanced editing.



High-Volume Execution: Generate a high volume of static and ugly ads daily from briefs and copy.



AI Integration: Utilize AI tools extensively to enhance productivity and creative output. Quickly convert AI-generated base visuals into high-performing ad creatives.



Testing & Iteration: Create multiple variations for A/B testing (hooks, layouts, formats) and adapt designs based on performance data to optimize click-through rates.



Systematization: Turn winning formats into repeatable systems.



Platform Optimization: Ensure designs are optimized for Meta & TikTok specs (including maintaining strict 1:1 aspect ratios when required).



Who You Are



1+ year of experience designing ads for DTC e-commerce.



Available to dedicate 30-40 hours a week to our operation.



Strong understanding of direct response principles and exactly what makes images "clickable" in native ad environments.



Highly skilled at AI image generation and editing tools, alongside Figma, Photoshop, or similar software.



Comfortable designing both polished static ads and raw ugly ads.



Ability to work independently with minimal direction, taking a concept and executing it quickly.



Excellent communication and a track record of timely delivery.



Understands that ugly ? lazy; it’s strategic.



Bonus (Nice to Have)



Experience using specific AI design tools (Nano Banana, Midjourney, etc.).



Background in health, beauty, or wellness brands.



Familiarity with Meta ad performance feedback loops.



Basic understanding of copywriting for ads.



You’ll Thrive Here If…



You believe good design = design that converts.



You understand when native ugly ads outperform polished ones.



You enjoy testing, iterating, and improving creatives at a high volume.



You hate over-designed fluff.



You want your work to directly impact revenue.



Growth Path

Graphic Designer ? Senior Designer ? Lead Designer ? Creative Strategist



To Apply

Please send:



Your resume / CV



A portfolio demonstrating your expertise in creating compelling ad visuals (especially those utilizing AI generation)



(If possible) examples of ads that actually performed



A short note on how you approach direct response ad design
